centers.english: to celebrate something

examples.english: Congratulations on your promotion - we must go out and celebrate!
examples.chinese: 恭喜你晋级—我们得出去庆祝一下！

examples.english: What do you want to do to celebrate our anniversary this year?
examples.chinese: 今年我们的〔结婚〕周年纪念日你想怎样庆祝?

examples.english: Harry celebrated his thirtieth birthday with a meal in a fancy restaurant.
examples.chinese: 哈里在一家豪华饭店吃饭，庆祝他30岁生日。

examples.english: The annual parade commemorates the soldiers who died in the two World Wars.
examples.chinese: 一年一度的游行纪念两次世界大战的阵亡将士。

examples.english: The book will be published in October to commemorate the 100th anniversary of Morris's death.
examples.chinese: 这本书将于10月份出版，以纪念莫里斯逝世100周年。

examples.english: Candles were lit in commemoration of Hiroshima's dead.
examples.chinese: 点燃蜡烛以纪念广岛的死难者。

examples.english: A parade was organised in honour of Madame Blier, who had risked her life to save the villagers from enemy soldiers.
examples.chinese: 组织游行是为了纪念布利尔夫人，她曾经冒着生命危险把村民从敌军手里救出来。

examples.english: When Mr Johns retired after 45 years’ service, the company held a party in his honour.
examples.chinese: 约翰斯先生工作了45年退休时，公司为他举行欢送会。

examples.english: The home stadium is named in Robinson's honor.
examples.chinese: 主场体育馆是为纪念罗宾逊而命名的。

examples.english: A firework display was organized to mark the Queen's birthday.
examples.chinese: 为庆祝女王生日而组织了烟火表演。

examples.english: The celebration marked the 100th anniversary of the staging of the modern Olympic Games.
examples.chinese: 庆祝活动是为了纪念现代奥林匹克运动会举行100周年。

examples.english: In celebration of the store's grand opening, we're offering free balloons for the kids.
examples.chinese: 为庆祝本店盛大开业，我们向小孩子分发免费气球。

examples.english: A retrospective film festival is being planned in celebration of the actor's 86th birthday.
examples.chinese: 正在筹划电影回顾展以庆祝那位演员86岁生日。

centers.english: a special event at which you celebrate something
centers.chinese: 为庆祝某事而特地安排的活动

examples.english: New Year celebrations in Scotland go on for three days.
examples.chinese: 苏格兰的新年庆祝活动为期三天。

examples.english: There is a two-day citywide celebration each year at the end of June.
examples.chinese: 每年6月底都举行为期两天的全市庆祝活动。

examples.english: The hospital is planning a huge celebration of its 50th anniversary.
examples.chinese: 那家医院正在筹划盛大的建院50周年庆祝活动。

examples.english: Janine had her birthday celebration a week early.
examples.chinese: 雅尼娜提前一星期庆祝了生日。

centers.english: when something or someone makes you laugh

examples.english: It was the funniest story I'd ever heard.
examples.chinese: 这是我听过的故事中最好笑的一个。

examples.english: He can be pretty funny when he's had a few drinks.
examples.chinese: 他几杯酒下肚以后会很风趣。

examples.english: The goat was chasing Mark round and round the field - it was so funny.
examples.chinese: 那只山羊追着马克在田里转着圈子跑，真是好笑。

examples.english: You look really funny in that hat.
examples.chinese: 你戴那顶帽子看起来很滑稽。

examples.english: Did you like ‘Notting Hill’? I thought it was hilariously funny.
examples.chinese: 你喜欢《诺丁山》这部电影吗？我觉得这片子好笑极了。

examples.english: I must tell Jerry what you said - it'll make him laugh.
examples.chinese: 我一定要把你的话说给杰里听，他会觉得好笑的。

examples.english: Charlie Chaplin was a great actor with a wonderful ability to make people laugh.
examples.chinese: 查利·卓别林是位伟大的演员，他具有令人难以置信的逗乐天才。

examples.english: It always makes me laugh when you look at me like that.
examples.chinese: 你那个样子看着我总是会让我发笑。

examples.english: I like a newspaper with one or two amusing articles, as well as all the serious stuff.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢那种在刊登所有严肃东西的同时又有一两篇趣味文章的报纸。

examples.english: He was a really special person, gentle and amusing at the same time.
examples.chinese: 他是个很特别的人，既温文尔雅同时又妙趣横生。

examples.english: Mrs Denton didn't find it amusing when I spilt all the paint on the floor.
examples.chinese: 我把油漆都洒到地上时，登顿太太并不觉得好笑。

examples.english: My mother was embarrassed, but I found the situation highly amusing.
examples.chinese: 我妈很窘，可我觉得这场面很有趣。

examples.english: The book is a humorous account of a young man's travels in South America.
examples.chinese: 这本书幽默地讲述了一位年轻人在南美洲旅行的故事。

examples.english: It was a brilliant speech - clear, precise and humorous.
examples.chinese: 这次演说很精彩，它清楚、简洁又幽默。

examples.english: humorous birthday cards
examples.chinese: 幽默的生日贺卡

examples.english: Sam is intelligent, witty, and great fun to be with.
examples.chinese: 萨姆聪明风趣，跟他在一起很有意思。

examples.english: I enjoyed the play - it had a clever plot and a very witty script.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢这部戏，它情节巧妙，对话非常风趣。

examples.english: Our attempts at dancing were hilarious - we all kept tripping over each other.
examples.chinese: 我们努力跳舞时的举动真是笑死人了，我们一直相互绊来绊去的。

examples.english: the hilarious BBC comedy series ‘Absolutely Fabulous’
examples.chinese: 滑稽到极点的英国广播公司的系列喜剧《妙不可言》

examples.english: Carlo looked so comical, striding along in a coat which nearly touched the ground.
examples.chinese: 卡洛看上去很滑稽，穿着一件几乎拖地的外套大踏步地走着。

examples.english: The puffin is an unusual sea bird, and there is something almost comical about the way it moves and looks.
examples.chinese: 海鹦是一种不寻常的海鸟，它的动作和长相有点近乎滑稽。

examples.english: Lizzie, bouncing along on the donkey, made a comical sight.
examples.chinese: 莉齐在驴背上一路颠簸，看上去很滑稽。

examples.english: He bowed comically and asked my sister to dance.
examples.chinese: 他样子滑稽地欠欠身并请我妹妹跳舞。

examples.english: We always try to keep our newsletter light-hearted, so that people will enjoy it.
examples.chinese: 我们总努力把通讯写得轻松，让大家读得愉快。

examples.english: The light-hearted way in which the author has approached this book should take some of the hard work out of trying to lose weight.
examples.chinese: 作者写这本书的风趣笔调可使读者减轻一些减肥的辛苦。

expressions.text: take a light-hearted look at something

examples.english: The film takes a light-hearted look at life in prison.
examples.chinese: 这部电影采取了一种轻松、风趣的手法描写监狱生活。

examples.english: Somehow, Moore manages to deal light-heartedly with subjects such as death and illness.
examples.chinese: 莫尔以某种轻松的手法处理了死亡和疾病这一类的主题。

examples.english: There were about 100 people there and it was a laugh from beginning to end .
examples.chinese: 那里约有100人，从开始到结束都是笑声不断。

examples.english: Wait until you meet Tony. He's a real laugh.
examples.chinese: 等到你见了托尼吧，他这人非常有趣。

examples.english: We all had to sleep in one tent and it was a laugh a minute.
examples.chinese: 我们大家都得睡在一个帐篷内，真是好玩极了。

examples.english: The movie has a script that is smartly funny, and Hugh Grant is a hoot!
examples.chinese: 这部影片的对白妙趣横生，休·格兰特真叫人笑痛肚子！

examples.english: At the end of the day, there was the moms’ soccer match, which was a hoot!
examples.chinese: 那天的最后一项活动是一场妈妈足球赛，那才叫笑死人呢！

centers.english: a funny film, play etc
centers.chinese: 滑稽有趣的电影、戏剧等

examples.english: ‘One Fine Day’ was a romantic comedy with George Clooney and Michelle Pfeiffer.
examples.chinese: 《一日钟情》是一部浪漫喜剧片，由乔治·克鲁尼和米歇尔·法伊弗主演。

examples.english: a comedy show on Channel 4
examples.chinese: 第四频道播出的喜剧节目

examples.english: The movie's a black comedy about a pair of junkie musicians who are trying to kick the drug habit.
examples.chinese: 这影片是部黑色幽默片，讲述了一对有毒瘾的音乐家想要戒毒的故事。

examples.english: Streep provided one of the best comic performances of her career.
examples.chinese: 斯特里普演出了她演艺生涯中最优秀的喜剧片之一。

examples.english: Like all comic writers, Shaw was fascinated by the gap between appearance and reality.
examples.chinese: 肖伯纳与所有幽默作家一样，也被表面与实际之间的差距强烈地吸引住了。

examples.english: Then Gertie got up on the stage and delighted us all by singing a comic song.
examples.chinese: 然后格蒂走上舞台，唱了一首滑稽歌曲来逗我们开心。

examples.english: In Shakespeare's Henry IV, the character of Falstaff provides us with a little comic relief.
examples.chinese: 在莎士比亚的剧本《亨利四世》中，福斯塔夫这一角色为我们提供了一点喜剧性调剂。

centers.english: when the opposite of what is expected happens
centers.chinese: 与原来的期望相反的事发生

examples.english: ‘I've heard that Dan's really upset about the divorce.’ ‘How ironic. He was always the one who was against them getting married in the first place.’
examples.chinese: “我听说丹让这桩离婚闹得很烦恼。”“这可真让人哭笑不得。他一直反对他俩结婚的。”

examples.english: It was an ironic situation, the two men in her life meeting like that.
examples.chinese: 这真是令人啼笑皆非的场面。她生命中的两个男人那样相见了。

examples.english: It's ironic that the most important people in the country often have so little understanding of how ordinary people live.
examples.chinese: 这国家最重要的人物经常对普通人的生活情况了解得那么少，太具有讽刺意味了。

examples.english: Ironically, the government ended up harming the very people it was trying to help.
examples.chinese: 令人啼笑皆非的是，政府结果伤害了他们想要帮助的那些人。

examples.english: Life is full of ironies, some hilarious, some tragic.
examples.chinese: 生活中充满了讽刺，有些可笑，有些却可悲。

examples.english: The irony of the situation was obvious -- if I told the truth, nobody would believe me!
examples.chinese: 这个情况的荒唐之处显而易见—如果我说实话，没有人会相信我！

examples.english: The irony is that some of the poorest countries have the richest natural resources.
examples.chinese: 具有讽刺意味的是有些最穷的国家拥有最丰富的自然资源。

centers.english: how you feel when you think something is funny
centers.chinese: 你觉得某物有趣时的感觉

examples.english: When I told him what had happened, he sounded amused rather than annoyed.
examples.chinese: 我把发生的事告诉他时，他似乎感到开心，而不是生气。

examples.english: They seemed amused at his embarrassment.
examples.chinese: 对他的窘迫他们好像很开心。

examples.english: My grandmother seemed to be highly amused by my remarks.
examples.chinese: 祖母看上去被我的话逗得非常开心。

examples.english: She stood watching them with an amused expression on her face.
examples.chinese: 她站着看他们，脸上挂着开心的表情。

examples.english: This story is bound to cause some amusement in the anti-Campbell campaign.
examples.chinese: 这则故事肯定会在反对坎贝尔的运动中引起一些乐趣。

examples.english: Everyone was watching the little dog with interest and amusement.
examples.chinese: 大家都兴致勃勃，满怀乐趣地看着那条小狗。

examples.english: Gloria couldn't hide her amusement at what the children were saying.
examples.chinese: 格洛丽亚听着孩子们的话，忍俊不禁。

examples.english: ‘You must be joking!’ Mum said, her lips curling in amusement.
examples.chinese: “你一定是开玩笑吧！”妈妈说道，嘴唇兴味十足地撅起着。

examples.english: Suddenly, the teacher's chair collapsed, much to everyone's amusement.
examples.chinese: 老师坐的椅子突然塌了，大家感到非常有趣。

centers.english: the quality in someone or something that makes them funny
centers.chinese: 某人或某物具有的有趣特性

examples.english: Everyone laughed except Dad, who obviously didn't appreciate the humour of the situation.
examples.chinese: 大家都笑了，只有爸爸没笑，他显然没弄懂这一情形的幽默之处。

examples.english: The most popular children's books are ones that have plenty of humor in them.
examples.chinese: 最受欢迎的儿童书是那些有大量幽默的作品。

examples.english: Tom Lehrer's black humor offended some people, who found jokes about such subjects as nuclear war unacceptable.
examples.chinese: 汤姆·莱勒的黑色幽默冒犯了一些人，他们觉得拿核战争这样的话题来开玩笑令人无法接受。

examples.english: It was a brilliant play - full of drama, and both sadness and comedy.
examples.chinese: 这部戏很出色，充满了戏剧性，悲喜的成分兼而有之。

examples.english: Much of the comedy in Pratchett's books comes from the clever way he plays around with words and ideas.
examples.chinese: 普莱切特的著作中大部分喜剧成分来自他巧妙机智的用词和构思。

examples.english: He seemed to have everything you could want in a man -- intelligence, wit, good looks and charm.
examples.chinese: 一个男人应该具备的他好像都有了一才智、风趣、英俊、魅力。

examples.english: The wit and irony of the original novel has been lost in the film version.
examples.chinese: 原小说中的智趣和讽刺性在电影改编中荡然无存。

centers.english: the ability to realize when something is funny
centers.chinese: 能领会到某物有趣的能力

examples.english: Mr Hardman was a popular teacher, renowned for his sense of humor.
examples.chinese: 哈德曼先生是位广受欢迎的教师，他的幽默感非常有名。

expressions.text: have a (good/great/strange etc) sense of humour

examples.english: I like Ann - she has such a good sense of humour.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢安——她有很强的幽默感。

examples.english: Maybe I'm losing my sense of humor but I didn't find it at all funny.
examples.chinese: 也许我的幽默感在消失，可我觉得这一点都不好笑。

examples.english: I hope he can take a joke - have you seen what they've done to his car?
examples.chinese: 真希望他开得起玩笑，你看见他们把他的汽车搞成什么样了吗？

examples.english: You may find army life difficult if you can't take a joke.
examples.chinese: 如果你开不起玩笑，那么你会觉得军队生活很难捱的。

examples.english: I explained that it was all my fault and fortunately she saw the funny side of the situation.
examples.chinese: 我解释那全是我的错，好在她觉得这事其实也很可笑。

expressions.text: see the funny side of it

examples.english: As a teacher, things often go wrong, and you have to be able to see the funny side of it.
examples.chinese: 当教师常常碰到不顺遂的事，你得能看到事情有趣的一面。

expressions.text: see the funny side of life

examples.english: A cartoonist's job is all about making people see the funny side of life.
examples.chinese: 漫画家的工作就是让大家看到生活中有趣的一面。

examples.english: We can laugh now, but at the time it seemed like the end of the world.
examples.chinese: 我们现在可以拿它说笑了，可当时好像是到了世界末日。

examples.english: Don't take yourself too seriously -- it's a good thing if you can laugh at yourself sometimes.
examples.chinese: 别自视过高—有时候能自嘲一下也是好事。

centers.english: physical activities in which people compete against each other

examples.english: She's interested in cinema, music and sport.
examples.chinese: 她对电影、音乐和体育活动很感兴趣。

examples.english: Sport has always been very important in this part of the country.
examples.chinese: 体育运动在该国这一地区历来都很重要。

examples.english: We don't do much sport at my school.
examples.chinese: 我们在学校里体育活动不是很多。

examples.english: Today's kids need to spend less time watching television, and more time playing sports.
examples.chinese: 现在的孩子需要少看电视，多运动。

examples.english: The boys have games on Monday, Wednesday and Friday afternoons.
examples.chinese: 男孩子们在星期一、星期三和星期五下午都有体育课。

examples.english: Hurry up or you'll be late for your games lesson.
examples.chinese: 快些，否则你体育课要迟到了。

examples.english: Sometimes in Phys. Ed. we're allowed to go on the trampolines.
examples.chinese: 我们上体育课有时候可以使用蹦床。

examples.english: How many times a week do you have P.E.?
examples.chinese: 你们一周有几节体育课？

centers.english: a particular sport or game

examples.english: His favourite sports are swimming and tennis.
examples.chinese: 他最喜爱的运动项目是游泳和网球。

examples.english: Motorcycle racing can be a dangerous sport.
examples.chinese: 摩托车比赛是一项危险的运动。

examples.english: Which sports do you play at school?
examples.chinese: 你们在学校里参加哪些体育运动？

examples.english: I think everyone should do at least one sport, in order to keep fit.
examples.chinese: 我认为每个人至少应该做一项运动，以保持身体健康。

examples.english: Rugby is a very exciting, fast-moving game.
examples.chinese: 橄榄球是一项非常刺激的快速运动。

examples.english: The girls at King Edward's play all sorts of games - basketball, hockey, tennis, to name just a few.
examples.chinese: 爱德华国王学校的女生参加各种体育运动—篮球、曲棍球、网球，这只是其中的几项。

centers.english: used for sport or related to sport
centers.chinese: 用于体育活动或与体育活动有关的

examples.english: Is there a shop that sells sports equipment near here?
examples.chinese: 这附近有卖体育用品的商店吗？

examples.english: Here is a list of the sports clubs in your area.
examples.chinese: 这里有一份你们这个地区的一些体育运动俱乐部的名单。

examples.english: Heavy rain has flooded the sports field: all fixtures have been cancelled for a month.
examples.chinese: 大雨淹没了运动场，一个月内所有定好的体育比赛都取消了。

examples.english: The Italian Grand Prix is one of the great sporting events of the year.
examples.chinese: 意大利国际汽车大奖赛是每年的体育盛会之一。

examples.english: The hotel has four restaurants, a bar and a disco, as well as an impressive range of sporting facilities.
examples.chinese: 这家酒店有四个餐馆、一个酒吧和一个迪斯科舞厅，还有各种令人难忘的体育运动设施。

examples.english: Sponsorship is important for sporting activities such as golf, football, cricket and motor-racing.
examples.chinese: 高尔夫球、足球、板球和赛车等体育活动，有赞助是很重要的。

centers.english: an occasion when people compete against each other in a sport

examples.english: Barcelona beat Real Madrid 3-2 in a thrilling game.
examples.chinese: 巴塞罗那队在一场扣人心弦的比赛中以3-2打败了皇家马德里队。

examples.english: I got two tickets for the Bulls’ game.
examples.chinese: 我有两张公牛队比赛的门票。

examples.english: Who won last night's game?
examples.chinese: 谁赢了昨天晚上的比赛？

examples.english: How about a game of tennis this evening?
examples.chinese: 今天晚上打场网球怎么样?

examples.english: Do you want to come and watch the volleyball game this Saturday?
examples.chinese: 你想来看这个星期六的排球比赛吗？

examples.english: Are you going to the match tomorrow?
examples.chinese: 你去看明天的比赛吗?

examples.english: If we win the next three matches, we could still go through to the semi-final.
examples.chinese: 如果我们能在接下来的三场比赛中胜出，还可以进入半决赛。

examples.english: A cricket match was in progress on the school sports field.
examples.chinese: 学校的运动场上正在进行板球比赛。

examples.english: What time does the first race start?
examples.chinese: 第一场比赛什么时候开始?

examples.english: Hill won the race, and Schumacher finished second.
examples.chinese: 希尔赢了比赛，舒马赫排名第二。

examples.english: Her husband spent all their money gambling on horse races.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫把他们所有的钱都拿去赌赛马了。

examples.english: the annual university boat race between Oxford and Cambridge
examples.chinese: 牛津大学和剑桥大学一年一度的划船比赛

centers.english: someone who does a sport

examples.english: One of the players had been injured, and had to leave the field.
examples.chinese: 一名球员受伤，只得退场。

examples.english: Kelleher was a star basketball player in high school and college.
examples.chinese: 凯莱赫在高中和大学的时候是一位篮球明星。

examples.english: Every top sportsman needs the motivation of a fresh challenge.
examples.chinese: 每一位一流的运动员都需要新的挑战来激励他们。

examples.english: Today's professional sportsmen can expect to earn enormous sums of money.
examples.chinese: 现在的职业运动员可以挣很多钱。

examples.english: Mrs Hashimoto described herself as a keen sportswoman, fond of golf, tennis and swimming.
examples.chinese: 桥本夫人说自己是一个爱好体育运动的人，喜欢打高尔夫球、打网球和游泳。

examples.english: The way he got to that ball shows what a superb athlete he is.
examples.chinese: 他接那个球的动作显出了他的球技之高超。

examples.english: Over 150 athletes will compete in the Indoor Championships at Gateshead International Stadium.
examples.chinese: 将有超过150名运动员参加在盖兹黑德国际体育场举行的室内田径锦标赛。

examples.english: It was discovered that three of our Olympic athletes had taken drugs.
examples.chinese: 我们有三名奥运会运动员被发现使用违禁药品。

centers.english: a group of people who play against another group

expressions.gram: countable noun with singular or plural verb in British English

examples.english: The women's team were beaten 6-2.
examples.chinese: 女子队以2-6被击败。

examples.english: I think the Yankees are one of the coolest baseball teams around.
examples.chinese: 我觉得洋基队是这里最好的棒球队之一。

examples.english: Which football team do you support?
examples.chinese: 你支持哪一个足球队？

examples.english: If you want to be on the team, you have to turn up for regular training.
examples.chinese: 如果你想进那个球队，就得定期训练。

examples.english: Supporters of both sides braved the cold wet weather to watch the match.
examples.chinese: 双方球队的支持者冒着寒冷在雨天观看比赛。

examples.english: Our side only needed one more goal to win.
examples.chinese: 我们的球队只需再进一球就能赢了。

examples.english: The captain must have given his team quite a talking-to at half time.
examples.chinese: 队长在中场休息的时候肯定把他的球队狠狠地训了一顿。

examples.english: Who's the captain of England?
examples.chinese: 英格兰队的队长是谁？

examples.english: Shelley's the girls’ team captain this year.
examples.chinese: 今年谢利是女子队的队长。

centers.english: a place where you do a sport

examples.english: The crowd cheered as the players ran onto the field.
examples.chinese: 球员跑进运动场时，人群欢呼了起来。

examples.english: The football field was too muddy to play on, so the game was cancelled
examples.chinese: 足球场太泥泞了，没法比赛，所以球赛取消了。

examples.english: Some open spaces north of the city will be made into sports fields for leisure activities.
examples.chinese: 城市北面的一些空地将改建成运动场，用于休闲活动。

examples.english: Several school playing fields have been sold off to raise money.
examples.chinese: 有几个学校操场被卖掉来筹钱。

examples.english: Some of the fans rushed onto the pitch at the end of the match
examples.chinese: 比赛结束时，一些球迷冲进了场地。

examples.english: The village has attractive playing fields, with a football and cricket pitch.
examples.chinese: 村里有吸引人的运动场，包括一个足球场和一个板球场。

examples.english: The courts are floodlit at night so that you can play all the year round.
examples.chinese: 球场在夜间有泛光灯照明，这样常年都可以举行比赛。

examples.english: The new leisure complex has a sauna, jacuzzi, swimming pool and tennis courts.
examples.chinese: 这个新的休闲中心有桑拿室、按摩浴缸、游泳池，还有网球场。

examples.english: The council is planning to build a multi-million pound leisure centre outside the town.
examples.chinese: 地方议会正计划在镇外建一个需要斥资数百万英镑的休闲中心。

examples.english: I've just signed up for an exercise class at the gym.
examples.chinese: 我刚刚报名参加了健身房的健身课。

examples.english: Ed goes to the gym to do weight training several times a week.
examples.chinese: 埃德一个星期好几次去健身房练举重。

examples.english: It was raining, so we had to play football in the gym this afternoon.
examples.chinese: 下雨了，所以这个下午我们只好在体育馆里踢足球。

examples.english: The house, with its own tennis court and swimming-pool, is for sale at £700.000.
examples.chinese: 这栋房子有自己的网球场和游泳池，以70万英镑的价格待售。

examples.english: There's an open air pool at Woodstock that's great when it's really hot.
examples.chinese: 伍德斯托克有一个室外游泳池，天热的时候很惬意。

examples.english: What we want is a hotel with a big heated pool, in case it rains.
examples.chinese: 我们想要的是一家有很大的温水游泳池的酒店，这样下雨也不怕了。

examples.english: The stadium has a capacity of at least 10,000.
examples.chinese: 这个体育馆可容纳至少一万人。

examples.english: Denver has a new airport, a new baseball stadium, and a reputation as a good place to live.
examples.chinese: 丹佛有一个新机场、一个新棒球场，都说丹佛是个居住的好地方。

centers.english: the person who makes sure that players obey the rules
centers.chinese: 确保运动员遵守规则的人

examples.english: To United's disbelief, the referee failed to award the goal.
examples.chinese: 让联队难以置信的是，裁判没有判进球有效。

examples.english: He made no attempt to hide his disgust at the umpire's decision, which cost him the match.
examples.chinese: 对于裁判员的裁决，他丝毫没有掩饰自己的气愤，这一判决使得他输掉了这场比赛。

examples.english: Who's refereeing the match?
examples.chinese: 这场比赛谁当裁判？

examples.english: The judges awarded first prize to 14-year-old Amanda Colton, on her horse, Donna.
examples.chinese: 评判把一等奖授予14岁的阿曼达·科尔顿和她的马唐娜。

centers.english: the points you get when you play a sport

examples.english: Steve Jones is 15 points ahead.
examples.chinese: 史蒂夫·琼斯领先15分。

examples.english: Damon Hill led the Formula 1 Championship, with 58 points from 6 races.
examples.chinese: 戴蒙·希尔在一级方程式锦标赛中领先，六场比赛中共获58分。

examples.english: We lost the game when the Giants scored 14 points in the last quarter.
examples.chinese: 我们输掉了比赛，巨人队在最后一节里得了14分。

examples.english: In darts, you get 50 points for hitting the bullseye.
examples.chinese: 投飞镖命中靶心可得50分。

examples.english: England's only goal came midway through the second half.
examples.chinese: 英格兰队在下半场中段时才踢进一球。

examples.english: Venturini has scored the first goal in each of the two US victories in the Olympics.
examples.chinese: 美国在奥运会上获胜的两场比赛中，文图里尼都是第一个破门得分的。

examples.english: Spurs got two goals in the last five minutes of the game.
examples.chinese: 热刺队在比赛的最后五分钟里进了两球。

examples.english: We won, but only because of an 88th minute own goal from the other side.
examples.chinese: 我们赢了，不过是因为在第88分钟的时候对方踢了一个乌龙球。

examples.english: What's the score?
examples.chinese: 比分是多少？

examples.english: The score at half time was 12-18.
examples.chinese: 中场休息的时候比分是12-18。

examples.english: After two hours and twenty minutes of play, the final score was 3-2.
examples.chinese: 比赛进行了两小时二十分钟，最后的比分是3-2。

centers.english: when two teams or players have the same score
centers.chinese: 两队或两个选手打成平分

examples.english: ‘What was the result of the Barcelona v Real Madrid game?’ ‘It was a draw.’
examples.chinese: “巴塞罗那队对皇家马德里队的比赛结果如何？”“打平了。”

examples.english: The second game was very exciting, but it ended in a tie.
examples.chinese: 第二场比赛打得很精彩，不过最后是平局。

expressions.text: be two all/be four all etc

examples.english: It's two all at the moment, but United seems to be the better team.
examples.chinese: 目前是2平，但联队好像表现得好一点。

examples.english: ‘What was the final score?’ ‘One all.’
examples.chinese: “最后的比分是多少?”“1平。”

centers.english: someone who watches a sport

examples.english: I'm not playing myself, I'm just a spectator.
examples.chinese: 我不是参赛者，我只是来观看比赛。

examples.english: Over 30,000 spectators turned out for the women's basketball match against Zaire.
examples.chinese: 三万多名观众到场观看了对扎伊尔的女子篮球赛。

examples.english: Thousands of fans queued to buy tickets.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的球迷排队买票。

examples.english: Over 200 British football fans were sent home after the violence in Rimini.
examples.chinese: 两百多名英国球迷在里米尼闹事后被遣送回国。

examples.english: Leeds fans howled in anguish as Arsenal scored another goal.
examples.chinese: 阿森纳队又踢进一球，利兹队的球迷痛苦地嚎叫了起来。

examples.english: Several supporters were arrested outside the stadium.
examples.chinese: 有几名球迷在体育馆外被捕。

examples.english: The town was full of football supporters, waiting for the big day.
examples.chinese: 镇上全是足球迷，等待着这一重大日子的到来。

examples.english: Milan supporters cheered as they scored their first goal in two games.
examples.chinese: 米兰队两场比赛下来踢进第一个球，球迷们欢呼了起来。

examples.english: ‘Which team do you support?’ ‘Oh, Manchester United, of course!’
examples.chinese: “你支持哪个球队？”“噢，当然是曼联队！”

centers.english: an activity played by rules that you do for enjoyment
centers.chinese: 用于娱乐、按规则玩的活动

examples.english: Chess is such a difficult game.
examples.chinese: 国际象棋是一种很难玩的游戏。

examples.english: Have you ever played Mah Jong? It's a Chinese game.
examples.chinese: 你打过麻将吗？这是中国人玩的游戏。

examples.english: The women set up bingo games and bake sales to raise money for the charity.
examples.chinese: 妇女们安排宾戈游戏，组织糕饼义卖会筹集善款。

examples.english: The game of golf was invented in Scotland.
examples.chinese: 高尔夫球运动起源于苏格兰。

examples.english: Chadwick suggested that baseball evolved from the English game of rounders.
examples.chinese: 查德威克认为，棒球由英国的圆场棒球游戏发展而来。

examples.english: In Wales, rugby is the national game.
examples.chinese: 在威尔士，橄榄球是一项全民运动。

examples.english: About 7 million households have people who play computer games.
examples.chinese: 大约有700万户家庭里都有人玩电脑游戏。

examples.english: ‘Psychic Detective’ is a CD-ROM computer game from Electronic Arts Studios.
examples.chinese: 《心灵侦探》是电子艺界公司出品的一种只读光盘电脑游戏。

examples.english: I'm not very good at card games.
examples.chinese: 我不是很会玩纸牌游戏。

examples.english: Harvey has devised a Spanish-English language card game.
examples.chinese: 哈维发明了西班牙语一英语的纸牌游戏。

examples.english: board games like Monopoly and Ludo
examples.chinese: 大富翁和鲁多棋等棋类游戏

centers.english: an occasion when people compete against each other in a game

examples.english: Sharpe had injured a knee in a football game a few weeks earlier
examples.chinese: 夏普在几个星期之前的一场足球比赛中膝部受了伤。

examples.english: Would you be up for a game of darts at the local pub?
examples.chinese: 你要参加当地酒馆里举行的飞镖比赛吗?

examples.english: We played three games of checkers, and she beat me every time.
examples.chinese: 我们玩了三盘西洋跳棋，每次都是她赢我。

expressions.text: best/worst/first etc game of the season

examples.english: We were able to get seats for the last game of the season.
examples.chinese: 在赛季的最后一场比赛，我们总算弄到了位子。

examples.english: Chess experts expected Kadparov to win the next match.
examples.chinese: 国际象棋专家预测下一场比赛将是卡斯帕罗夫胜出。

examples.english: A cricket match was in progress on the school sports field.
examples.chinese: 学校的运动场上正在进行一场板球比赛。

examples.english: Keith sprained his wrist in a wrestling match.
examples.chinese: 基思在摔跤比赛中扭伤了手腕。

examples.english: Tomorrow's match against Portugal is expected to be the big event of the season.
examples.chinese: 明天与葡萄牙队的较量将是本赛季的一场重大赛事。

examples.english: John rarely misses a sporting event in his town.
examples.chinese: 约翰很少错过自己镇上举办的体育赛事。

examples.english: Wimbledon is one of Britain's great sporting events.
examples.chinese: 温布尔登网球赛是英国重要的体育赛事之一。

centers.english: to play a game

examples.english: I used to play tennis all the time.
examples.chinese: 我以前经常打网球。

examples.english: Do you know how to play backgammon?
examples.chinese: 你会玩西洋十五子棋吗？

examples.english: Ask Alex if he wants to play.
examples.chinese: 问问亚历克斯要不要玩。

examples.english: Sweet Lou played for the Detroit Tigers.
examples.chinese: 斯威特·卢效力于底特律猛虎队。

examples.english: ‘They played well against us,’ Cooper said, ‘I have to give them credit.’
examples.chinese: “他们和我们比赛打得很好，”库珀说，“我不得不佩服他们。”

examples.english: I'll give you a game of chess if you want.
examples.chinese: 你想的话我就陪你下一盘国际象棋。

examples.english: No one wants to give him a game because he's too good.
examples.chinese: 没有人想和他较量，因为他太出色了。

centers.english: someone who plays a game

examples.english: a game for four players
examples.chinese: 四个人玩的游戏

examples.english: Rodriguez was voted Player of the Year.
examples.chinese: 罗德里格斯当选为“年度最佳球员”。

examples.english: I like chess, even though I'm not a very good player.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢国际象棋，虽然我下得不是很好。

examples.english: Wikerson is not as good a player as Phillips.
examples.chinese: 维克森打得不如菲利普斯好。

examples.english: Brownlee regards Reaney as his most difficult opponent.
examples.chinese: 布朗利把雷尼看作是自己最难应付的对手。

examples.english: My opponent was much older than I was.
examples.chinese: 我的对手年龄比我大很多。

examples.english: You're the best person on the team.
examples.chinese: 你是球队里最出色的人。

examples.english: Pub quiz teams often have really silly names.
examples.chinese: 智力竞赛队伍往往都取了很傻的名字。

examples.english: Nasser Hussain, the England team captain, was injured in the game against the West Indies.
examples.chinese: 英格兰队队长纳赛尔·侯赛因在对西印度群岛队的比赛中受了伤。

centers.english: when children play games

examples.english: This is the schoolground where we played as children.
examples.chinese: 我们小时候就是在这个操场上玩的。

examples.english: We played card games and hide-and-seek.
examples.chinese: 我们打扑克，玩捉迷藏。

examples.english: Ian was upstairs playing with his new train set.
examples.chinese: 伊恩在楼上玩他新买的套装火车玩具。

examples.english: Jimmy was playing with a little boat in the bathtub.
examples.chinese: 吉米在浴缸玩着一艘小船。

examples.english: We used to play at cops and robbers.
examples.chinese: 我们以前常玩警察与小偷的游戏。

centers.english: to praise someone or something

examples.english: Fire chiefs praised a 10-year-old girl who saved her brother's life yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天消防队长们表扬了一名拯救了弟弟生命的十岁女孩。

examples.english: Local people were praised for their calm response to the crisis.
examples.chinese: 当地民众因冷静应对危机而受到表扬。

examples.english: His column was a regular and highly praised feature of the newspaper.
examples.chinese: 他的专栏是该报固定栏目，深受赞扬。

examples.english: I would like to congratulate all the prizewinners.
examples.chinese: 我谨向所有的得奖者道贺。

examples.english: The President congratulated him on winning the title.
examples.chinese: 总统祝贺他获此称号。

examples.english: I wrote a letter congratulating him on his appointment.
examples.chinese: 我写信祝贺他获得任命。

examples.english: The committee is to be congratulated for presenting its findings in such an informative manner.
examples.chinese: 该委员会以如此令人增长见识的方式阐述其发现应该受到称赞。

examples.english: She blushed when men complimented her.
examples.chinese: 男子恭维她时，她脸红起来。

examples.english: Everyone complimented me on my new hairstyle.
examples.chinese: 所有人都说我的新发型好看。

examples.english: Peter is always very complimentary about your work.
examples.chinese: 彼得对你的工作一直十分赞赏。

examples.english: She was actually highly complimentary about you.
examples.chinese: 她真的对你推崇备至。

examples.english: People are saying really good things about you -- that you are well-trained, are thorough, conscientious...
examples.chinese: 人们在说你的好话——说你受过良好的训练，工作仔细，勤勤恳恳…

examples.english: I'm so pleased to meet you -- my wife has always spoken very highly of you.
examples.chinese: 很高兴见到你——我妻子经常称赞你。

examples.english: All her former clients speak highly of her legal skills.
examples.chinese: 她以前的客户全都高度赞赏她的法律技能。

examples.english: John Motum, presenting the trophy, paid tribute to the players and coaches.
examples.chinese: 约翰·莫滕颁发奖杯，他向运动员和教练表示敬意。

examples.english: Friends of the actor paid tribute to his talent and expressed shock as news of his death became public.
examples.chinese: 那位演员的死讯公布后，他的朋友纷纷赞扬他的天赋并表达震惊之情。

expressions.text: put in a good word for

examples.english: The producers told me later that I got the job because Paul put in a good word for me.
examples.chinese: 制片人后来告诉我，我获得这份工作是因为保罗为我说了好话。

expressions.text: put in a good word for somebody with somebody

examples.english: Can you put in a good word for me with your colleagues on the council?
examples.chinese: 你能不能替我向你在委员会的同事求个情？

centers.english: to praise someone or something a lot
centers.chinese: 对某人或某事大加赞赏

examples.english: The press were full of praise for the whole production.
examples.chinese: 新闻界对整场演出赞不绝口。

examples.english: Ramsey, who hosts a Christian radio show, is full of praise for the two new congressmen.
examples.chinese: 拉姆齐，一个基督教电台节目的主持人，对两位新国会议员大加赞扬。

examples.english: Craig adored Jane and would sing her praises to anyone who would listen.
examples.chinese: 克雷格深深地爱着简，他向每一个愿意倾听的人表达自己对她的赞美之情。

examples.english: Feminists have long sung the praises of writers such as Germaine Greer and Simone de Beauvoir.
examples.chinese: 长久以来，女权主义者一直对像杰梅茵·格里尔与西蒙娜·德·波娃那样的作家大唱赞歌。

examples.english: Critics are raving about the new show.
examples.chinese: 评论家们在极力赞扬这出新戏。

examples.english: I bought some of that Colombian coffee you used to rave about.
examples.chinese: 我买了些过去你极力夸奖的哥伦比亚咖啡。

examples.english: The emperor's achievements were glorified in numerous poems.
examples.chinese: 大量的诗歌颂扬这位皇帝的功绩。

examples.english: The book is a vain attempt to glorify the name of one of the worst dictators in modern history.
examples.chinese: 该书试图美化现代史上一名最残暴的独裁者，结果是白费劲。

examples.english: It's nice to receive a letter heaping praise on someone for a job well done, for a change.
examples.chinese: 难得收到一封对某人工作大加赞扬的信，真高兴。

examples.english: She is modest and generous, lavishing praise on the musicians she has worked with.
examples.chinese: 她谦虚、宽厚，对共事的乐师大加赞扬。

centers.english: to be praised in newspapers or by many people
centers.chinese: 在报纸上受到赞扬或受许多人赞扬

examples.english: I haven't read it yet, but I know her latest novel got a very good press.
examples.chinese: 我还没读过，但我知道人们对她的最新小说评价很高。

examples.english: Eastern European cars have never really had a good press in this country.
examples.chinese: 东欧汽车在该国从没真正得到过好评。

examples.english: Her roles in ‘Miami Vice’ and ‘A Room with a View’ got rave reviews.
examples.chinese: 她在《迈阿密风云》及《看得见风景的房间》两片中扮演的角色有口皆碑。

examples.english: Despite getting rave reviews, the film was not a box office hit.
examples.chinese: 尽管该影片好评如潮，但是并不卖座。

examples.english: Paul Simon's solo career has resulted in a string of highly acclaimed albums.
examples.chinese: 保罗·西蒙的独唱生涯留下一系列深受好评的专辑。

examples.english: Her work on finding a cure for cancer has been widely acclaimed by her colleagues in the medical profession.
examples.chinese: 她为探索癌症疗法而作出的努力受到医学界同行们的广泛赞扬。

examples.english: ‘The West Wing’ is one of the most critically acclaimed TV series in the USA.
examples.chinese: 《白宫风云》是美国最为评论家们津津乐道的电视连续剧之一。

examples.english: They run a much-praised restaurant in Soho.
examples.chinese: 他们开设在苏豪区的餐厅口碑甚佳。

examples.english: The Beatles’ album ‘Sergeant Pepper’ was much praised when it first came out.
examples.chinese: 披头士乐队的专辑《佩珀军士》刚一面世就受到人们的推崇。

examples.english: She is being hailed as the new Marilyn Monroe.
examples.chinese: 她被誉为新玛丽莲·梦露。

examples.english: The new peace agreement is being hailed as a major breakthrough.
examples.chinese: 新的和平协议被誉为是一次重大突破。

examples.english: When it was first introduced, the birth control pill was hailed as a wonder drug.
examples.chinese: 避孕药刚刚推出时，被誉为是一种灵丹妙药。

centers.english: to praise someone in an insincere way

examples.english: Flatter her a little - tell her she's beautiful.
examples.chinese: 稍微奉承她一下一告诉她说她很美。

examples.english: His flattering comments embarrassed her.
examples.chinese: 他的恭维话令她感到不好意思。

examples.english: It's no use trying to butter me up -- I'm not changing my mind.
examples.chinese: 讨好我没有用—我不会改变主意的。

examples.english: The bank has to butter up investors in this fiercely competitive market.
examples.chinese: 在这竞争激烈的市场，银行得拍投资者的马屁。

centers.english: praise that is given to someone or something

examples.english: The police deserve a lot of praise for the way they handled the situation.
examples.chinese: 警方对这一情况的处理方式值得大大表扬。

examples.english: The charity has earned widespread praise for its work.
examples.chinese: 这家慈善机构因其工作广受称赞。

examples.english: She said you have talent, and that's high praise coming from a best-selling author like her.
examples.chinese: 她说你有才能，那是她那样的畅销书作家对你作的高度夸奖。

examples.english: ‘You have lovely hair,’ said Bob to Emma, who blushed at the compliment.
examples.chinese: 鲍勃对埃玛说，“你的头发很漂亮”，埃玛听了恭维话脸都红了。

examples.english: He's always paying her compliments and buying her flowers.
examples.chinese: 他老是赞美她，给她买花。

examples.english: Rob always showered me with compliments and made me feel special.
examples.chinese: 罗布总对我大加赞赏，令我感觉与众不同。

examples.english: She used a mixture of persuasion and flattery to get what she wanted.
examples.chinese: 她施展劝说加奉承的功夫获得自己想要的东西。

examples.english: I'll choose the best person for the job, so flattery will get you nowhere.
examples.chinese: 我会选择最合适的人来担任此项工作，所以溜须拍马帮不了你的忙。

examples.english: She had to spend 10 years as a struggling artist, before receiving any recognition for her work.
examples.chinese: 在未得到公众对其作品的认可前，作为一个艺术家，她不得不苦苦奋斗了十年。

examples.english: Although he was popular in Europe, Hendrix had yet to achieve recognition in his home country.
examples.chinese: 亨德里克斯尽管在欧洲广受欢迎，但他在自己的祖国尚未得到认可。

examples.english: Patroni received an official commendation after rescuing twelve people from a sinking ship.
examples.chinese: 帕特洛尼从行将沉没的船上救起12个人，因而受到政府的表扬。

examples.english: After winning the world championship, he received a note of commendation from the President.
examples.chinese: 他赢得世界冠军后，总统写了一封短信给他，以示嘉奖。

centers.english: what you say when you praise someone

examples.english: Well done! You got all the answers right.
examples.chinese: 干得好！你的答案全对。

examples.english: Good job, John! That was a great shot.
examples.chinese: 好呀，约翰！那个投篮棒极了。

examples.english: Congratulations! Is it a girl or boy?
examples.chinese: 恭喜！是女孩还是男孩?

examples.english: Congratulations on your new job, Jenny.
examples.chinese: 祝贺你获得一份新工作，珍妮。

examples.english: Congratulations on passing your driving test.
examples.chinese: 祝贺你通过驾驶考试。

examples.english: ‘I got accepted at Stanford.’ ‘Way to go!’
examples.chinese: “我被斯坦福大学录取了。”“干得好！”

examples.english: Way to go Sam! Nice hit!
examples.chinese: “干得好萨姆！打得漂亮！”

centers.english: words for describing statements that praise someone or something
centers.chinese: 描述赞扬的言论的词语

examples.english: Despite glowing reviews about the company's core businesses, its shares have fallen.
examples.chinese: 尽管该公司的核心业务大受赞赏，但是它的股票下跌了。

examples.english: The young soldiers who returned home gave glowing accounts of Paul's bravery and devotion to duty.
examples.chinese: 返回家里的年轻士兵都热烈赞扬了保罗的勇敢及忠于职守。

examples.english: Stephen always talks in glowing terms of your work.
examples.chinese: 斯蒂芬一直高度赞扬你的工作。

examples.english: The reviewers spoke glowingly about a young actor named Jack Nicholson.
examples.chinese: 评论家们称赞青年演员杰克·尼科尔森。

examples.english: Everything I've heard about your work has been highly complimentary.
examples.chinese: 我听到别人谈论你的工作时都是对你大加赞扬。

examples.english: Responses to his latest movie have generally been favourable.
examples.chinese: 人们对他的最新影片普遍称赞有加。

examples.english: I don't want to hear your opinion -- unless it's favourable of course.
examples.chinese: 我不想听你的意见——当然如果表示赞扬就另当别论了。

centers.english: words for describing behaviour or actions that deserve praise
centers.chinese: 描述值得赞扬的行为或行动的词语

examples.english: The headteacher thanked the boys for their efforts, which he said were most commendable.
examples.chinese: 校长感谢那些男孩所作的努力，他说他们的努力是最值得赞扬的。

examples.english: The whole workforce has adapted to the new computing system with commendable speed.
examples.chinese: 全体员工以值得称道的速度适应新的计算机系统。

examples.english: The police acted with commendable restraint, considering the amount of pressure they were under.
examples.chinese: 考虑到警方在行动中承受的巨大压力，他们的克制是值得称赞的。

examples.english: The investigation was commendably thorough.
examples.chinese: 调查进行得很彻底，值得赞扬。

examples.english: Giving blood is regarded by most people as something praiseworthy.
examples.chinese: 大多数人认为献血是值得赞扬的。

examples.english: Negotiators have made a praiseworthy attempt to bring the two sides together.
examples.chinese: 为解决双方的纷争，谈判者已作出值得称道的努力。

examples.english: Equal pay for equal work is a laudable principle.
examples.chinese: 同工同酬是一项值得称赞的原则。

examples.english: Such honesty is laudable and rare.
examples.chinese: 如此诚实值得称赞而且难得一见。

centers.english: music

examples.english: What kinds of music do you like?
examples.chinese: 你喜欢哪类音乐?

examples.english: The music was so loud you couldn't carry on a conversation.
examples.chinese: 音乐声这么响让人没法交谈。

examples.english: Would you like to listen to some music?
examples.chinese: 你想听些音乐吗？

examples.english: The Royal College of Music
examples.chinese: 皇家音乐学院

examples.english: Did you study music at school?
examples.chinese: 你在学校里学过音乐吗？

examples.english: The club has live music every Saturday night.
examples.chinese: 这家俱乐部每星期六晚都有乐师现场演奏音乐。

examples.english: I've never been a big fan of country music.
examples.chinese: 我向来不太喜欢乡村音乐。

examples.english: Do you play a musical instrument?
examples.chinese: 你会演奏乐器吗？

examples.english: Her teachers told her she had no musical ability whatsoever.
examples.chinese: 老师们告诉她，她丝毫没有音乐天分。

examples.english: O'Connor uses a wide variety of musical styles in his performances.
examples.chinese: 奥康纳演奏时采纳了各种各样的音乐风格。

examples.english: It is amazing how expressive she makes each note sound.
examples.chinese: 她让每个音符听起来都抒发思想感情，令人惊叹。

examples.english: Some of the singers had a little trouble with the high notes.
examples.chinese: 有的歌手唱高音有些困难。

examples.english: The music box plays the tune ‘Send in the Clowns.’
examples.chinese: 这只音乐盒奏的曲调是《让小丑登场》。

examples.english: I've heard that tune before, but I don't know the words to the song.
examples.chinese: 那段旋律我以前听到过，但我不知道这首歌的歌词。

examples.english: The song has a simple melody and beautiful lyrics.
examples.chinese: 这首歌旋律质朴，歌词优美。

examples.english: Melody is not the central element in Martino's compositions - rhythm is more important.
examples.chinese: 马蒂诺的曲子中旋律不是关键性因素，节奏才更重要。

examples.english: The harmonies in her symphonies are wonderfully rich.
examples.chinese: 她的交响乐中和声极为丰富。

examples.english: All first year music students are required to take a class in harmony.
examples.chinese: 所有学习音乐的一年级学生都要上和声课。

examples.english: You need to feel the rhythm of the music in order to dance properly.
examples.chinese: 要把舞步踏准就要感觉音乐的节奏。

examples.english: The band's music is known for its fiery Latin rhythms.
examples.chinese: 这个乐队的音乐以其火辣辣的拉丁节奏而闻名。

examples.english: Jessica moved her hips to the beat of the music.
examples.chinese: 杰茜卡随着乐曲的节拍扭动臀部。

examples.english: Their new song has a good beat that you can dance to.
examples.chinese: 他们的新歌节拍很不错，你可以跟着跳舞。

centers.english: a piece of music

examples.english: The CD contains two pieces performed by the Tokyo String Quartet.
examples.chinese: 这张唱片收有东京弦乐四重奏组演奏的两首乐曲。

examples.english: It's difficult to know ahead of time whether an audience will like a new piece of music.
examples.chinese: 事先很难知道听众是否会喜欢一首新曲子。

examples.english: That's a pretty song - where did you learn it?
examples.chinese: 那首歌真好听，你从哪儿学来的?

examples.english: The song ‘Yesterday’ is one of the most often recorded songs in the world.
examples.chinese: 《昨日》这首歌是世界上最经常灌录的歌曲之一。

examples.english: In the evenings we'd sit around the campfire and sing songs.
examples.chinese: 晚上我们就围坐在篝火旁唱歌。

examples.english: Stone's composition ‘Idaho’ became a national hit when Benny Goodman recorded it for Columbia.
examples.chinese: 斯通的作品《爱达荷》经本尼·古德曼为哥伦比亚唱片公司录音之后就成了全国走红的热门曲子了。

examples.english: Zwilich's flute concerto was nominated for Best Contemporary Classical Composition.
examples.chinese: 兹维利奇的长笛协奏曲被提名角逐“最优秀现代古典音乐作品”奖。

examples.english: The performance began with two of Mozart's early works.
examples.chinese: 此次演出以两首莫扎特的早期作品开场。

examples.english: Handel's ‘Messiah’ is one of the most majestic musical works ever written.
examples.chinese: 汉德尔的《弥赛亚》是有史以来最为庄严宏伟的音乐作品之一。

examples.english: ‘The show's not very good.’ ‘We can leave after this number if you want.’
examples.chinese: “演出不怎么样。”“你愿意的话这首唱完我们就走。”

examples.english: Nell Carter also appeared and performed a couple of upbeat numbers.
examples.chinese: 内尔·卡特也出场演唱了几首欢快的歌曲。

centers.english: to play music

examples.english: Do you play in an orchestra?
examples.chinese: 你在管弦乐队里演奏吗?

examples.english: Charles likes to play Celtic music on his flute.
examples.chinese: 查尔斯喜欢用长笛吹奏凯尔特音乐。

examples.english: I didn't know you could play the violin.
examples.chinese: 我不知道你会拉小提琴。

examples.english: She still gets very nervous about performing in public.
examples.chinese: 她对公开演奏仍感到非常紧张。

examples.english: The orchestra will be at the Festival Hall tonight, performing a selection of works by Russian composers.
examples.chinese: 今晚该乐队将在节日音乐厅演奏几首精选的俄罗斯作曲家的作品。

examples.english: When they perform, Barbara sings and her older sister Suzie is on drums.
examples.chinese: 她们演出时由芭芭拉唱歌，她姐姐苏茜打鼓。

examples.english: The recording features Norman Simmons on piano and Henry Johnson on guitar.
examples.chinese: 这首乐曲中诺曼·西蒙斯弹钢琴，亨利·约翰逊弹奏吉他。

examples.english: You can't play jazz unless you can improvise.
examples.chinese: 除非你会即兴演奏，否则就不能演奏爵士乐。

examples.english: Mike improvised a little farewell song at the end of the evening.
examples.chinese: 晚会的最后迈克即兴演唱了一首短小的告别歌。

examples.english: Some guys are getting together tonight at Scott's to jam.
examples.chinese: 今晚一些人聚集在斯科特家即兴演奏。

examples.english: Matthews used to jam with drummer Carter Beauford and saxophonist LeRoi Moore.
examples.chinese: 马修斯过去常和鼓手卡特·博福德及萨克斯管手雷罗伊·穆尔一起即兴演奏。

examples.english: All-night jam sessions were common in Kansas City jazz clubs of the 1930s.
examples.chinese: 20世纪30年代时通宵即兴合奏会在堪萨斯城的爵士乐俱乐部是很常见的。

examples.english: He never took piano lessons - he just plays by ear.
examples.chinese: 他从没上过钢琴课，他只是凭听觉记忆的演奏。

examples.english: With the Suzuki method, a child is trained to play by ear at an early age without any written music.
examples.chinese: 按铃木教学法，小儿不需乐谱只凭耳朵学习如何演奏。

centers.english: someone who plays music

examples.english: Ellen is one of our most talented young musicians.
examples.chinese: 埃伦是我们最有才华的年轻乐师之一。

examples.english: The group is made up of local musicians who have been performing together for several years.
examples.chinese: 这个乐队由本地乐师组成，他们在一起演奏已有几年了。

examples.english: Most performers feel nervous before they go on stage.
examples.chinese: 大多数表演者上台之前都会感到紧张。

examples.english: The festival provides an opportunity to hear some fine blues performers at reasonable prices.
examples.chinese: 这次音乐节以合理的票价提供了一次聆听几位优秀布鲁斯演奏家演奏的机会。

examples.english: Simpson is a talented singer and piano player.
examples.chinese: 辛普森是位天赋很高的歌手及钢琴演奏家。

examples.english: She sang ‘I'll Fly Away,’ accompanied by two guitar players.
examples.chinese: 在两名吉他手的伴奏下，她唱了《我欲远走高飞》。

examples.english: I'd be happy to sing, but I'll need an accompanist.
examples.chinese: 我很乐意唱，但需要一个伴奏者。

examples.english: Pianist Tommy Flanagan is among the finest accompanists in jazz history.
examples.chinese: 钢琴手汤米·弗拉纳根是爵士乐史上最出色的伴奏者之一。

examples.english: There will be four soloists in tonight's performance.
examples.chinese: 今晚的演奏会上将有四位独奏者。

examples.english: Violin soloist Jessica Solano will perform Mozart's Concerto No. 4.
examples.chinese: 小提琴独奏家杰茜卡·索拉诺将演奏莫扎特的《第四小提琴协奏曲》。

examples.english: A street musician sat on the other side of the courtyard, banging a drum.
examples.chinese: 一名街头演奏家坐在院子的另一头打鼓。

examples.english: In the summer, buskers fill the town's streets and public squares.
examples.chinese: 夏季，镇子的街道上和公共广场上到处都是街头艺人。

centers.english: to write music

examples.english: I wrote the next song for my wife.
examples.chinese: 下面一首歌曲我是写给妻子的。

examples.english: an opera written by Verdi
examples.chinese: 威尔第创作的一部歌剧

examples.english: I sit at the piano when I write.
examples.chinese: 我作曲时坐在钢琴边。

examples.english: Glass composed the music for Cocteau's movie.
examples.chinese: 格拉斯为科克托的电影配乐。

examples.english: a song composed by Schubert
examples.chinese: 舒伯特谱写的一首歌曲

examples.english: The children will now play some pieces that they composed themselves.
examples.chinese: 孩子们现在要演奏几首自己谱的曲子。

examples.english: Dario composes for a living.
examples.chinese: 达里奥以谱曲为生。

examples.english: The Greek tragedy ‘Elektra’ was set to music by Richard Strauss.
examples.chinese: 古希腊悲剧《埃莱克特拉》被理查德·斯特劳斯配了音乐。

examples.english: She sat at the piano for hours, putting one of her poems to music.
examples.chinese: 她一连在钢琴前坐了很多小时为自己的一首诗谱曲。

centers.english: someone who writes music

examples.english: Henry Purcell was one of the greatest English composers.
examples.chinese: 亨利·普赛尔是英国最伟大的作曲家之一。

examples.english: Amelia likes German composers, particularly Wagner.
examples.chinese: 阿梅莉亚喜欢德国作曲家，尤其是瓦格纳。

examples.english: Most of Elton John's early hits were written by songwriter Bernie Taupin.
examples.chinese: 埃尔顿·约翰的大部分受欢迎的早期歌曲都是歌曲作家贝尔尼·托潘创作的。

examples.english: Music on the show is performed by singer-songwriter Vonda Shepard.
examples.chinese: 节目中的音乐是由歌手兼歌曲作家冯达·谢泼德演唱的。

centers.english: a public performance of music

examples.english: There's a free band concert in Reid Park this afternoon.
examples.chinese: 今天下午在里德公园内有一场免费的乐队音乐会。

examples.english: Amanda has a solo in the school chorus concert this year.
examples.chinese: 今年的学校合唱音乐会上阿曼达要唱一段独唱。

examples.english: Various performers will present a concert of Broadway music to benefit AIDS charities.
examples.chinese: 好几位表演者将举行一场音乐会，演奏百老汇音乐来赞助艾滋病慈善机构。

examples.english: On Friday we're going to a concert of modern African music.
examples.chinese: 星期五我们要去听一场现代非洲音乐会。

examples.english: Are you going to see Britney Spears this weekend?
examples.chinese: 本周末你打算去听布兰妮·斯皮尔斯的演唱吗？

examples.english: There are no tickets left for this evening's performance.
examples.chinese: 今晚的演出已经没余票了。

examples.english: It is the first performance of Berlioz's Requiem in this city in over 20 years.
examples.chinese: 20多年来柏辽兹的《安魂曲》是首次在这座城市演出。

examples.english: Have you ever heard a live performance of Beethoven's Seventh Symphony?
examples.chinese: 你听过贝多芬的《第七交响曲》的现场演奏吗？

examples.english: We have a gig in L.A. on Thursday.
examples.chinese: 星期四我们在洛杉矶开一场演唱会。

examples.english: They are doing about 30 gigs on their European tour.
examples.chinese: 他们在欧洲巡回演出时要开大约30场演唱会。

examples.english: I first heard them play at the Pittsburgh Jazz Festival.
examples.chinese: 我第一次听他们演奏是在匹兹堡爵士音乐节上。

examples.english: Are you going to the Glastonbury festival this year?
examples.chinese: 今年你打算去参加格拉斯顿伯里音乐节吗？

centers.english: to dance

examples.english: Everyone got up and danced.
examples.chinese: 人人都站起来跳舞。

examples.english: Will you dance with me?
examples.chinese: 你能和我跳个舞吗？

examples.english: If you like dancing to drum and bass, come to the Coven on Saturday night.
examples.chinese: 如果你跳舞喜欢有鼓和低音吉他伴奏，周六晚上到科文舞厅来。

examples.english: The disco starts at 11pm so you can dance the night away.
examples.chinese: 迪斯科舞会在晚上11点开始，你可以跳个通宵。

expressions.text: dance the waltz/the tango/the twist etc

examples.english: I have an old photo of my parents dancing a waltz.
examples.chinese: 我有张爸妈在跳华尔兹的旧照片。

examples.english: My boyfriend doesn't like dancing.
examples.chinese: 我男朋友不爱跳舞。

examples.english: There was music, Scottish dancing, and lots of food.
examples.chinese: 有音乐、苏格兰舞蹈，还有大量食物。

examples.english: Mum and Dad used to go dancing every Friday night.
examples.chinese: 妈妈和爸爸过去每周五晚上都出去跳舞。

examples.english: She got up and did a little dance.
examples.chinese: 她起来跳了一小段舞。

examples.english: The tribespeople did a special dance, which they said would bring rain.
examples.chinese: 部落成员跳了一种特别的舞蹈，他们说那种舞能招雨。

expressions.text: do the waltz/the tango/the twist etc

examples.english: Can you do the twist?
examples.chinese: 你会跳扭摆舞吗？

centers.english: a set of movements performed to a particular type of music
centers.chinese: 配合某类音乐的某套动作

examples.english: I prefer old-fashioned dances like the waltz or the tango.
examples.chinese: 我比较喜欢跳华尔兹或探戈一类的旧式舞。

examples.english: Hungarian folk dances
examples.chinese: 匈牙利民间舞

examples.english: The surprise hit of that summer was ‘Macarena’, which was also a dance craze.
examples.chinese: 那年夏天“玛卡莲娜”突然走红，也成了风行一时的舞蹈热。

examples.english: Can you show me the right steps for this dance?
examples.chinese: 你能给我示范一下跳这种舞的正确舞步吗？

examples.english: I'd like to dance but I don't know the steps.
examples.chinese: 我想跳舞，但不知道舞步。

examples.english: It took me ages to get right some of the more complicated dance steps.
examples.chinese: 我花了很长时间才掌握了一些更复杂的舞步。

centers.english: someone who dances

examples.english: I'm not a very good dancer.
examples.chinese: 我跳舞跳得不太好。

examples.english: a world famous dancer
examples.chinese: 世界著名舞蹈家

examples.english: The ballet dancer, Rudolph Nureyev, died at the age of fifty-four.
examples.chinese: 芭蕾舞演员鲁道夫·努里耶夫54岁时逝世。

examples.english: When I saw her again, she was dancing with a different partner.
examples.chinese: 我再看到她时，她正和另一位舞伴在跳舞。

examples.english: Try not to step on your partner's toes.
examples.chinese: 留心别踩到舞伴的脚趾。

centers.english: a social event where people dance
centers.chinese: 人们在一起跳舞的一种社交活动

examples.english: Do you want to go to the dance on Saturday night?
examples.chinese: 星期六晚你想去参加舞会吗？

examples.english: Dances used to be held in the church hall at least once a month.
examples.chinese: 以前一个月至少在教堂大厅举行一次舞会。

examples.english: The Society are holding their 15th anniversary dinner dance at the Broomshill Hotel.
examples.chinese: 该学会在布鲁姆斯希尔酒店举行15周年纪念晚餐舞会。

examples.english: I met some friends at a party and then we went on to a club.
examples.chinese: 我在聚会上遇到一些朋友，然后我们去了夜总会。

examples.english: If you want to go clubbing, London's the place to be.
examples.chinese: 假如你想去夜总会玩，伦敦可是个好地方。

examples.english: Nick met Rachel at a disco when she was 17 years old.
examples.chinese: 尼克是在一家迪斯科舞厅遇上雷切尔的，那时她17岁。

examples.english: It was a small seaside town with a couple of bars and one shabby-looking disco.
examples.chinese: 那是一个海滨小镇，有几家酒吧和一家肮脏破旧的迪斯科舞厅。

examples.english: It was the first time I'd ever been invited to a ball.
examples.chinese: 那是我第一次被邀请去参加舞会。

examples.english: The University holds a summer ball at the end of June.
examples.chinese: 那所大学在6月底举办夏季舞会。

examples.english: Joey walked me home after the prom.
examples.chinese: 学生舞会结束后，乔伊送我回家。

examples.english: The band first played together at a high school prom.
examples.chinese: 这个乐队首次在一起演出是在一个高中舞会上。

centers.english: to invent a set of movements or steps to be used in a dance
centers.chinese: 设计一套用于某种舞蹈的动作或舞步

examples.english: She has been asked to choreograph a modern ballet for the National Dance Theatre.
examples.chinese: 她受托为国立舞蹈剧院的现代芭蕾舞剧设计舞蹈动作。

examples.english: There were some fabulous, beautifully choreographed dance routines.
examples.chinese: 有几套设计得出色而又美妙的舞步。

examples.english: She studied choreography at the Royal School of Ballet.
examples.chinese: 她曾在皇家芭蕾舞学校学编舞。

examples.english: The splendid choreography was by Ann-Marie Brady.
examples.chinese: 这套杰出的舞步是由安玛丽·布雷迪编成的。

examples.english: McKayle was considered the leading black modern dance choreographer of his day.
examples.chinese: 麦凯尔被认为是同时代最杰出的黑人现代舞编舞家。

centers.english: to sing

examples.english: Sophie sings in the church choir.
examples.chinese: 索菲在教堂合唱团唱歌。

examples.english: I could hear someone singing downstairs.
examples.chinese: 我听到有人在楼下唱歌。

examples.english: They sat together and sang songs.
examples.chinese: 他们坐在一起唱歌。

examples.english: All the family sang ‘Happy Birthday’ as Dad came in.
examples.chinese: 爸爸进来的时候，全家人都唱起了“祝你生日快乐”。

examples.english: Come on, David, sing us a song!
examples.chinese: 来吧，戴维，给我们唱首歌！

examples.english: She sat in a corner, singing softly to her baby.
examples.chinese: 她坐在角落里，轻轻地给宝宝唱歌。

examples.english: Sing along if you know the words.
examples.chinese: 如果知道歌词就跟着一起唱。

examples.english: Anyone who could play an instrument or sing in tune was enlisted to take part in the concert.
examples.chinese: 凡是会演奏一种乐器，或唱歌不走调的，都可以参加这个音乐会。

examples.english: I hear Frank's taken up singing again.
examples.chinese: 我听说弗兰克又干起唱歌这个行当了。

examples.english: Everyone joined in with the singing.
examples.chinese: 大家都跟着一起唱起来。

examples.english: He asked her why she didn't make use of her talent and give singing lessons.
examples.chinese: 他问她为什么不利用自己的天赋教唱歌。

examples.english: Danni decided to come to England to launch her singing career.
examples.chinese: 丹妮决定到英格兰发展她的歌唱事业。

examples.english: The choir belted out songs from West End shows for over an hour.
examples.chinese: 合唱团高唱西区演出节目里的歌曲，唱了一个多小时。

examples.english: This is a big theatre - you have to really belt it out.
examples.chinese: 这个剧院很大，你得放声高歌才行。

examples.english: He felt so happy he wanted to burst into song.
examples.chinese: 他高兴得想放声歌唱。

examples.english: The orchestra played a few notes and the choir burst into song.
examples.chinese: 管弦乐队弹奏了几个音，合唱团就唱了起来。

examples.english: A woman gently crooned the tune of a lullaby.
examples.chinese: 一名女子轻声哼着催眠曲。

examples.english: She wandered around the tables, while crooning ‘Embraceable You’.
examples.chinese: 她游走在桌子中间，轻轻地唱着《可拥抱的你》。

examples.english: The band was formed in 1999, with Stevie on vocals.
examples.chinese: 这个乐队成立于1999年，由史蒂维主唱。

examples.english: We went to see a band who had Julia Fordham on backing vocals.
examples.chinese: 我们去看了一个乐队的演出，是由茱利娅·福德姆伴唱的。

centers.english: to make a musical sound without words

examples.english: She hummed softly to herself as she worked.
examples.chinese: 她一边干活，一边轻轻地哼着曲子。

examples.english: Musicals are uplifting, and you are sure to leave the theatre humming a cheerful tune.
examples.chinese: 音乐剧可以振奋人心，你离开剧院的时候肯定会哼着一首快乐的小曲。

examples.english: He stacked crates one on top of the other, whistling as he did so.
examples.chinese: 他把箱子一个一个摞起来，一边摞一边吹口哨。

examples.english: You've been whistling that tune all day.
examples.chinese: 这个曲子你吹了一天的口哨了。

centers.english: someone who sings

examples.english: I wanted to have a career as a singer.
examples.chinese: 我想以歌手作为职业。

examples.english: Jodie dreamed of being a rock singer.
examples.chinese: 乔迪梦想着成为一名摇滚歌手。

examples.english: She's very pretty, and a good singer too.
examples.chinese: 她很漂亮，歌也唱得很好。

examples.english: Mick Jagger, the lead singer with the Rolling Stones
examples.chinese: 米克·贾格尔，“滚石”乐队的主唱歌手

examples.english: In those days we had a band with a brass section and a couple of female backing singers.
examples.chinese: 那时候我们的乐队有一个铜管组，还有几个女声伴唱。

examples.english: The female vocalist came on in a long white gown.
examples.chinese: 女歌手身穿白色长礼服走上台来。

examples.english: He's a session musician, providing studio backing to well-known vocalists.
examples.chinese: 他是位伴奏乐师，给一些著名歌手作录音室伴奏。

examples.english: Tom, the lead vocalist, is also a talented guitarist.
examples.chinese: 主唱歌手汤姆同时也是一位天赋很高的吉他手。

examples.english: I have always sung in choirs.
examples.chinese: 我一直在合唱团里唱歌。

examples.english: He's a member of a Welsh Male Voice Choir.
examples.chinese: 他是威尔士男声合唱团的一名成员。

examples.english: The school choir performed Vivaldi's Gloria.
examples.chinese: 学校合唱团演唱了维瓦尔弟的《荣耀经》。

examples.english: Ray Charles and Aretha Franklin started singing in gospel choirs, not at music lessons.
examples.chinese: 雷·查理斯和阿蕾莎：富兰克林是在福音唱诗班里开始唱歌的，而不是上音乐课开始唱的。

examples.english: The chorus's singing was excellent, and so was the orchestral playing.
examples.chinese: 合唱队唱得很出色，管弦乐队的演奏也很不错。

centers.english: relating to singing

examples.english: The band's stunning vocal harmonies have earned them a big name in the States.
examples.chinese: 这个乐队美妙的声乐和声使他们名满全美。

examples.english: the Beach Boys and other early '60s teen vocal groups
examples.chinese: “沙滩男孩”以及60年代初其他一些青少年演唱组

examples.english: traditional Welsh choral music
examples.chinese: 传统的威尔士合唱音乐

examples.english: The programme includes choral works, and music for string orchestra.
examples.chinese: 节目中有合唱曲，也有弦乐演奏。

centers.english: to take part in a show, concert, play etc
centers.chinese: 在节目、音乐会、戏剧等中表演

examples.english: Before every concert, she worries about how well she will perform.
examples.chinese: 每场音乐会之前，她都担心自己的表现。

examples.english: The children perform a Christmas pantomime every year.
examples.chinese: 孩子们每年都会表演一场圣诞节童话剧。

examples.english: Russell's one-woman show, Shirley Valentine, was first performed by Pauline Collins.
examples.chinese: 拉塞尔的独角戏《雪莉·瓦伦丁》最早是由保利娜·柯林斯出演的。

examples.english: Paltrow won an Oscar for her performance in ‘Shakespeare in Love’
examples.chinese: 帕尔特罗因出演《莎翁情史》而获奥斯卡奖。

examples.english: A packed arena with a receptive crowd lifts any singer's performance.
examples.chinese: 挤满观众的表演场地能提升歌手的表演。

examples.english: Pavarotti will be appearing in a number of concerts over the summer.
examples.chinese: 帕瓦罗蒂将在夏季许多音乐会上演出。

examples.english: The American actors’ union threatened to prevent her from appearing in the New York version of the show.
examples.chinese: 美国演员联合会威胁说要阻止她在该剧的纽约版中演出。

examples.english: Hopkins will be appearing as Willie Lomax in next week's production.
examples.chinese: 霍普金斯将在下周的演出中饰演威利·洛马克斯。

examples.english: Do you remember Larry Hagman? He used to be in ‘Dallas’.
examples.chinese: 你记得拉里·哈格曼吗？他演过《豪门恩怨》。

examples.english: It's my ambition to be in a film.
examples.chinese: 我的志向是演电影。

centers.english: to perform without having planned or practised something
centers.chinese: 未经安排或练习而表演

examples.english: Modern jazz players like to take a theme and improvise around it.
examples.chinese: 现代爵士乐手喜欢取一个主题后围绕该主题进行即兴表演。

examples.english: It was difficult to believe that the whole sketch was improvised.
examples.chinese: 很难相信整幅速写竟是即兴创作而成的。

examples.english: His new album is full of improvisations.
examples.chinese: 他的新专辑里有许多即兴作品。

examples.english: Rapping relies heavily on improvisation.
examples.chinese: 说唱乐在很大程度上是即兴表演的。

examples.english: No one could remember the song very well, so we had to ad-lib.
examples.chinese: 没有人清楚地记得那首歌，所以大家只得即兴演唱。

examples.english: The other actors were thrown into confusion when she started ad-libbing her final speech.
examples.chinese: 当她开始即兴说出最后的台词时，其他演员都方寸大乱。

centers.english: someone who performs in a show, concert, play etc
centers.chinese: 在节目、音乐会、戏剧等中表演的人

examples.english: Enrico is impressive both as a performer and a choreographer.
examples.chinese: 恩里科既表演又编舞，他在两方面都予人以深刻的印象。

examples.english: As a jazz performer she is astounding, capable of expressing a broad range of feeling and expression.
examples.chinese: 作为一名爵士乐表演者，她能够令人惊奇地表达丰富多样的情感。

examples.english: Tara is a seasoned performer who started acting at the age of 10.
examples.chinese: 塔拉是个经验十足的演员，10岁起就开始登台了。

examples.english: Many of the artists in the show donated their fees to charity.
examples.chinese: 许多参加表演的艺术家把他们的所得捐给了慈善机构。

examples.english: The band are not just successful recording artists - they are constantly touring and playing live to sell-out crowds.
examples.chinese: 那支乐队不仅是优秀的录音室艺术家一他们经常巡回演出，为满座的观众现场表演。

centers.english: to arrange and perform a show, concert, play etc
centers.chinese: 安排进行演出、音乐会、戏剧表演等

examples.english: The students are putting on an end of term concert.
examples.chinese: 学生们将举行期末音乐会。

examples.english: A special show is being put on to raise money for famine victims in Africa.
examples.chinese: 为了筹集资金帮助非洲的饥民，正在举行一场特别演出。

examples.english: It cost thousands of pounds to stage the concert, including performers’ fees and the hire of equipment.
examples.chinese: 举办这场音乐会要花费数千英镑，包括表演者的费用及设备的租金。

examples.english: They staged a magnificent production of ‘Aida’ in the amphitheatre.
examples.chinese: 他们在圆形露天剧场上演了一台精彩的《阿伊达》。

examples.english: We're doing "The Merchant of Venice' at the local theater for two weeks.
examples.chinese: 我们将在当地剧院演出两个星期的《威尼斯商人》。

examples.english: I've done dozens of shows in the north of England, and the audiences were great!
examples.chinese: 我在英格兰北部表演过几十次，观众很热情！

examples.english: The National Theatre is presenting "King Lear' later this month.
examples.chinese: 国家剧院本月晚些时候将上演《李尔王》。

examples.english: This evening PBS presents the first part of a six-part historical drama about the Civil War.
examples.chinese: 今晚，美国公共广播公司将播放描写内战的六集历史剧的第一集。

centers.english: an occasion on which a play, piece of music etc is performed
centers.chinese: 戏剧、音乐作品等的演出

examples.english: The evening performance will begin at 8:00 pm.
examples.chinese: 晚间表演将在8点开始。

examples.english: There was a performance of ‘Giselle’ in the San Diego State Open Air Theatre.
examples.chinese: 圣迭戈州立露天剧场上演了《吉塞尔》。

centers.english: something that is performed in public to entertain people

examples.english: We went to see a show on Broadway when we were in New York.
examples.chinese: 我们在纽约的时候曾去百老汇看歌舞演出。

examples.english: Every year the theatre puts on a show that runs until the end of January.
examples.chinese: 每年，那家剧院会上演一个节目，直到一月底。

examples.english: Cowan's one-man show opens on April 16th.
examples.chinese: 考恩的独角戏于4月16日上演。

examples.english: Have you seen the new Shakespeare production at the Arts Center?
examples.chinese: 你去艺术中心看过新上演的莎士比亚戏剧吗?

examples.english: He will star in the Los Angeles production of "Phantom of the Opera' this year.
examples.chinese: 今年，他将主演在洛杉矶上演的《歌剧魅影》。

expressions.text: put on a production/stage a production

examples.english: The Riverside Theatre is used to staging major productions.
examples.chinese: 里弗赛德剧院用于上演大型演出。

examples.english: We used to do a comedy act together.
examples.chinese: 我们过去一起演滑稽短剧。

examples.english: Part of his act involves dressing up as a woman.
examples.chinese: 他演的短剧有一段要男扮女装。

examples.english: He was injured in a circus act that went wrong.
examples.chinese: 他在一次马戏表演事故中受伤。

centers.english: the business of entertaining people with shows, plays, films etc
centers.chinese: 以演出、戏剧、电影等娱乐人们的行业

examples.english: Blackpool was where I got my first taste of the world of entertainment.
examples.chinese: 布莱克浦是我第一次体会到娱乐界滋味的地方。

examples.english: Frankie is known throughout the entertainment business as an energetic performer.
examples.chinese: 弗朗姬作为演员以精力旺盛闻名娱乐业。

examples.english: Famous sportsmen and people from the world of showbusiness are among their clients.
examples.chinese: 著名的运动员和娱乐界人物是他们的客户。

examples.english: Here's Sarah with the latest showbiz gossip.
examples.chinese: 现在由萨拉报道最新的娱乐新闻。

examples.english: What made you decide on a career in showbusiness?
examples.chinese: 是什么让你决定投身娱乐界的？

centers.english: films and going to see them

examples.english: Are there any good movies on TV tonight?
examples.chinese: 今晚电视里放什么好电影吗?

examples.english: What's your favourite James Bond film?
examples.chinese: 你最喜欢的詹姆斯·邦德电影是哪部？

examples.english: The film starred Tom Cruise and Nicole Kidman.
examples.chinese: 这部影片由汤姆·克鲁斯和妮科尔·基德曼主演。

examples.english: Have you seen any good films lately?
examples.chinese: 最近你看过什么好电影吗？

examples.english: I saw an Arnold Schwarzenegger movie on the plane - I can't remember its name.
examples.chinese: 我在飞机上看了一部阿诺德·施瓦辛格主演的影片，我不记得片名了。

examples.english: It's the usual sort of film about boy meets girl.
examples.chinese: 那是一部普普通通的男女青年恋爱的影片。

examples.english: Tarantino is one of the most famous film directors of our time.
examples.chinese: 塔伦蒂诺是当代最著名的电影导演之一。

examples.english: For months the town was full of cameras, lighting and members of the film crew.
examples.chinese: 几个月来镇上全是摄影机、灯光设备以及电影摄制组成员。

examples.english: The story of Lawrence of Arabia was made into a feature film in 1962.
examples.chinese: 阿拉伯的劳伦斯的故事于1962年被拍摄成故事片。

examples.english: the MGM cinema in Leicester Square
examples.chinese: 莱斯特广场上的米高梅电影院

examples.english: The city put $6.5 million towards a 10-screen movie theater and retail complex in Main Street.
examples.chinese: 该市花费650万美元在主街建造一个商场，其中有一家10个银幕的电影院。

expressions.text: go to the cinema /go to the movie

examples.english: Do you want to go the movies this weekend?
examples.chinese: 这个周末你想去看电影吗？

examples.english: The last time I went to the cinema was when I saw ‘Stigmata’.
examples.chinese: 我最后一次去电影院是去看《圣痕》。

examples.english: ‘Three Kings’ is on at the Phoenix at the moment.
examples.chinese: 现在凤凰影院正在放《夺金三王》。

examples.english: Spielberg's new blockbuster is currently playing at over 2000 theaters nationwide.
examples.chinese: 斯皮尔伯格导演的最新大片目前正在全国两千多家电影院上映。

examples.english: What's on at the cinema this weekend?
examples.chinese: 这个周末电影院放什么电影？

centers.english: types of film
someone who performs in plays, films etc
centers.chinese: 在戏剧、电影中演出的人

examples.english: Leonardo DiCaprio is my favourite actor -- he's so good-looking!
examples.chinese: 莱奥纳多·迪卡普里奥是我最喜欢的演员—他长得多英俊啊！

examples.english: Actor Sidney Poitier was honoured with a Life Achievement Award.
examples.chinese: 演员悉尼·波特获授终身成就奖。

examples.english: Ben Chaplin is an English actor who had a small part in ‘Remains of the Day’.
examples.chinese: 本·查普林是一名英国演员，曾在《告别有情天》中扮演过一个小角色。

examples.english: Julia Roberts is one of the most famous actresses in Hollywood.
examples.chinese: 朱莉娅·罗伯茨是好莱坞最出名的女演员之一。

examples.english: Capucine, the French movie actress whose leading roles included one with Peter Sellers in ‘The Pink Panther’, died after falling from a window.
examples.chinese: 法国女演员卡普西尼从窗口坠落而死，她主演的影片包括与彼得·塞勒斯合演的《粉红豹》。

examples.english: Eddie Murphy is one of the most successful stars in Hollywood.
examples.chinese: 埃迪·墨菲是好莱坞最成功的影星之一。

examples.english: James Caan was a big star in the '70s.
examples.chinese: 詹姆斯·卡安是70年代的大明星。

examples.english: Her real ambition is to be a movie star, not just an actress on the stage.
examples.chinese: 她真正的抱负是成为电影明星，而不是仅仅当一个舞台演员。

examples.english: Film stars like Michael Caine are trying to revive the British film industry by making movies in England.
examples.chinese: 迈克尔·凯恩等电影明星企图通过在英格兰制作电影来重振英国的电影事业。

examples.english: There's nothing worse than watching a bunch of luvvies giving speeches at some awful awards ceremony.
examples.chinese: 最没意思的莫过于看一帮虚情假意的演员在什么无聊的颁奖仪式上致辞。

expressions.gram: countable noun with singular or plural verb in British English

examples.english: Films like ‘Ben Hur’ were made with a cast of thousands.
examples.chinese: 《宾虚》这样的电影由成千上万个演员参加演出。

examples.english: The entire cast of the play deserves praise for this performance.
examples.chinese: 这部戏全体演员的表演值得称赞。

centers.english: to perform in plays, films etc

examples.english: In recent years Lewis has been acting in television dramas.
examples.chinese: 近年来刘易斯一直在电视剧中演出。

examples.english: He learned to act when he was in high school.
examples.chinese: 他在高中时学过演戏。

examples.english: That woman just can't act! is bad at acting
examples.chinese: 那女人根本不会演戏！

examples.english: Milla Jovovich plays Joan of Arc in ‘The Messenger’.
examples.chinese: 米拉·乔沃维奇在《圣女贞德》中饰演圣女贞德。

examples.english: The roles of Vladimir and Estragon were played by Paul Whitworth and Ken Grantham.
examples.chinese: 弗拉基米尔和埃斯特拉贡分别由保罗·惠特沃斯和肯·格兰瑟姆饰演。

examples.english: Jane's parents didn't want her to go on the stage.
examples.chinese: 简的父母不希望她当演员。

centers.english: the activity or study of acting

examples.english: You shouldn't take up acting as a career; it's a very risky business.
examples.chinese: 你不应该把演戏作为一种职业，这行业很不稳定。

examples.english: Gloria Reuben quit acting to join Tina Turner on stage as a backing singer and dancer.
examples.chinese: 格洛丽亚·鲁本弃影登台，为蒂娜·特纳伴唱伴舞。

examples.english: She does some TV work, but theatre remains her first love.
examples.chinese: 她也做一些电视工作，但戏剧仍是她的最爱。

examples.english: the use of theatre in primary school education
examples.chinese: 小学教育中采用戏剧表演

examples.english: Shakespeare's plays were written for the theater, but many people study them as literature.
examples.chinese: 莎士比亚的剧本是为舞台表演而写，但是许多人也把它们作为文学来研究。

examples.english: He studied English and Drama at Manchester University.
examples.chinese: 他在曼彻斯特大学学习英语和戏剧。

examples.english: a drama student
examples.chinese: 戏剧专业学生

examples.english: I was never much good at drama when I was a kid - probably because I was very shy.
examples.chinese: 我小时候从不擅长戏剧表演—可能是我太害羞了。

examples.english: Jonathan once appeared in a local amateur dramatics production of ‘Death of a Salesman’.
examples.chinese: 乔纳森曾在当地的业余演出中演过《推销员之死》。

examples.english: Her hobbies include amateur dramatics and horse riding.
examples.chinese: 她的爱好有业余戏剧表演和骑马。

centers.english: the most important actor in a play, film etc
centers.chinese: 戏剧、电影等中最主要的演员

examples.english: Peter Fonda is best known as the star of ‘Easy Rider’ and other 1960s biker films.
examples.chinese: 彼得·方达最出名的是主演《逍遥骑士》等20世纪60年代讲述摩托车手的影片。

examples.english: ‘Blair Witch’ star Heather Donahue has landed a new role in a college reunion film called ‘Seven and a Match’.
examples.chinese: 《厄夜丛林》的主角希瑟·多纳休谋到了一个新的角色，演出一部讲大学同学会故事的电影《七人聚会》。

examples.english: Stan Laurel appeared in many comedies with his co-star Oliver Hardy.
examples.chinese: 斯坦·劳雷尔和他的搭档奥利弗·哈迪联袂主演了许多喜剧片。

examples.english: Hepburn was Humphrey Bogart's co-star in the movie ‘African Queen’.
examples.chinese: 赫伯恩与汉弗莱·鲍嘉联袂主演影片《非洲女王号》。

centers.english: when a play, film etc has a particular actor in it
centers.chinese: 戏剧、电影等中有某位演员演出

examples.english: The film stars Patricia Arquette and is directed by Steven Brill.
examples.chinese: 这部影片由帕特里夏·阿奎特领衔主演，史蒂文·布里尔执导。

examples.english: Director Jane Campion's latest film, which stars Kate Winslet and Harvey Keitel, was one of the highlights of the New York Film Festival.
examples.chinese: 导演简·坎皮恩的最新影片是这次纽约电影节的亮点之一。主演这部影片的是凯特·温斯莱特和哈维·凯特尔。

examples.english: Danny Aiello stars in this comedy about New York's first big lottery winner.
examples.chinese: 丹尼·艾洛主演这部关于纽约第一位中巨额彩票的人的喜剧片。

examples.english: Hollywood heart-throb Keanu Reeves is set to star in a true story based on a newspaper article from the Times.
examples.chinese: 好莱坞万人迷基努·里维斯将会出演一个根据《泰晤士报》的一篇文章改编的真实故事。

examples.english: The movie co-stars Sarah Jessica Parker, Elle Macpherson and Ben Stiller.
examples.chinese: 该影片由萨拉·杰茜卡·帕克、艾尔·麦克弗森和本·斯蒂勒联袂主演。

examples.english: Annette Bening co-starred in movies such as ‘Valmont’, ‘Postcards from the Edge’ and ‘Regarding Henry’.
examples.chinese: 安妮特·贝宁与人合演过《最毒妇人心》、《来自边缘的明信片》和《意外的人生》等影片。

examples.english: Calloway played the lead in the New Federal Theater's production of ‘The Louis Armstrong Story’.
examples.chinese: 卡洛韦在纽约联邦剧院上演的《路易斯·阿姆斯特朗传》中担任主角。

examples.english: He got an unexpected chance to play the lead after the film's original star fell ill.
examples.chinese: 这部电影原定的明星病了，这使他意外地得到了一次担任主角的机会。

examples.english: More than 60 youngsters will perform in the play at Old Town Theater in Los Gatos.
examples.chinese: 在洛斯加托斯古镇剧院上演的这出戏中，将有六十多个年轻人参加演出。

examples.english: Clark Gable and Vivien Leigh appeared together in ‘Gone with the Wind’.
examples.chinese: 克拉克·盖博和费雯丽联袂演出《乱世佳人》。

examples.english: The play features two young actresses.
examples.chinese: 这出戏由两个年轻女演员主演。

examples.english: The original ‘Star Trek’ series, featuring William Shatner as Capt. Kirk and Leonard Nimoy as Mr. Spock, lasted three years.
examples.chinese: 最早的《星际迷航》连续剧播放了三年，由威廉·沙特纳饰演柯克船长，伦纳德·尼莫伊饰演斯波克先生。

examples.english: Have you seen ‘The Sixth Sense’ with Bruce Willis?
examples.chinese: 你看过布鲁斯·威利斯的《灵异第六感》吗?

examples.english: Dawson is now producing a stage version of the story with a cast of young actors from New York.
examples.chinese: 道森现在正把这个故事搬上舞台，由一组来自纽约的年轻演员出演。

examples.english: Clint Eastwood was excellent as the strong, silent hero in his many westerns.
examples.chinese: 克林特·伊斯特伍德在许多西部片中把坚强寡言的英雄演得很出色。

examples.english: Paul McGann will star as a middle-class Jewish lawyer in a new BBC drama called ‘Fish’.
examples.chinese: 保罗·麦根将主演英国广播公司的一部新剧《鱼》，饰演一位中产阶级的犹太人律师。

centers.english: the person that an actor pretends to be in a play, film etc
centers.chinese: 演员在戏中、电影中等所扮演的人

examples.english: Jed is one of most likeable characters in the play.
examples.chinese: 杰德是剧中最讨人喜欢的人物之一。

examples.english: Carmen Maura plays the passionate, beautiful Pepa, the central character of director Pedro Almodovar's movie.
examples.chinese: 卡门·毛拉饰演由佩德罗·阿尔莫多瓦执导的影片的中心人物—多情漂亮的皮帕。

examples.english: She knew she wanted the part as soon as she read the movie script.
examples.chinese: 她一看电影脚本就想演这个角色。

examples.english: She played the part of the Wicked Stepmother in ‘Snow White’.
examples.chinese: 她在《白雪公主》中饰演邪恶的后母一角。

centers.english: to play a game or do a sport

examples.english: Karl loves basketball and plays almost every weekend.
examples.chinese: 卡尔喜欢篮球，几乎每个周末都打球。

examples.english: Every Sunday we play Monopoly or some other board game.
examples.chinese: 每个星期日我们都玩大富翁游戏或其他棋类游戏。

examples.english: I'm playing in a tennis match this Sunday.
examples.chinese: 本周日我要参加一场网球赛。

examples.english: It's been a long time since I played hockey.
examples.chinese: 我很久没打曲棍球了。

examples.english: I do aerobics twice a week.
examples.chinese: 我每周做两次有氧操。

examples.english: He used to do karate when he was in college.
examples.chinese: 他在读大学的时候练过空手道。

examples.english: John goes running every morning.
examples.chinese: 约翰每天早上跑步。

examples.english: Make sure whoever you go climbing with is a safe and trustworthy partner.
examples.chinese: 一定要确保登山的伙伴是个稳健、可信的人。

centers.english: to play against someone else
centers.chinese: 在比赛或运动中以另一人作对手

examples.english: Barcelona will play Milan in the final.
examples.chinese: 巴塞罗那队将在决赛中与米兰队对阵。

examples.english: This was McDaniel's first game playing against his former teammates.
examples.chinese: 这是麦克丹尼尔首次与前队友对阵。

examples.english: Dad's out playing golf with Barry this morning.
examples.chinese: 今天早上爸爸外出与巴里打高尔夫球。

examples.english: I'm playing Andy at tennis this afternoon.
examples.chinese: 今天下午我与安迪打网球。

examples.english: Tomorrow, Jane Wilkes, a first-round qualifier, takes on the world number one, Monica Seles.
examples.chinese: 明天，通过首轮比赛的选手简·威尔克斯将挑战世界头号选手莫妮卡·塞莱斯。

examples.english: UCLA will face North Carolina tonight at Pauley Pavilion.
examples.chinese: 今晚洛杉矶加州大学队将在波利体育馆挑战北卡罗来纳大学队。

examples.english: If you want to play chess ask Maria -- she'll give you a game.
examples.chinese: 如果你想下棋，问问玛丽亚吧—她会与你比试比试的。

examples.english: Yesterday in the semi-final we saw Sampras versus Henman.
examples.chinese: 昨天的半决赛中我们看了桑普拉斯对享曼的比赛。

examples.english: It's a friendly game - the women versus the men.
examples.chinese: 这是场友谊赛—女队对男队。

examples.english: Today's games include the Chicago Bulls vs. the Boston Celtics.
examples.chinese: 今天的赛事包括芝加哥公牛队对波士顿凯尔特人队的比赛。

examples.english: Gascoigne was back in the UK, to play in the England v France match.
examples.chinese: 加斯科因回到英国，参加英格兰队对法国队的比赛。

centers.english: someone who plays a game or does a sport

examples.english: One of the players has been sent off the field.
examples.chinese: 一名选手被罚出赛场。

examples.english: He is recognized as the world's greatest chess player.
examples.chinese: 他被公认为是世界上最伟大的国际象棋选手。

examples.english: The school has a reputation for producing top-class football players.
examples.chinese: 该学校以培养出顶级的足球选手而闻名。

examples.english: The competitors tonight come from all over the world.
examples.chinese: 今晚的参赛选手来自世界各地。

examples.english: The competitors in the 100m sprint are being asked to take their places at the start.
examples.chinese: 参加100米短跑的选手要求在起跑线上各就各位。

examples.english: Contestants for the game show go through a tough selection process.
examples.chinese: 这个游戏节目的参赛选手要经历严格的选拔。

examples.english: a beauty pageant contestant
examples.chinese: 选美参加者

examples.english: Tonight we remember one of the greatest sportsmen of our time.
examples.chinese: 今晚，我们纪念当代一位最伟大的运动员。

examples.english: The prizes are being presented by sportswoman Tessa Sanderson.
examples.chinese: 这些奖品由女运动员特莎·桑德森颁发。

examples.english: He won the magazine's ‘Sportsman of the Year’ award in 1999.
examples.chinese: 他赢得该杂志1999年的年度运动员奖。

centers.english: a group of people who play together against another group
centers.chinese: 一组在比赛中对抗另一组的人

examples.english: Both teams are looking tired now.
examples.chinese: 两支球队现在看上去都很疲劳。

examples.english: Walsh coached the team to two Super Bowl championships.
examples.chinese: 沃尔什执教该队两次夺得超级碗赛冠军。

examples.english: Tim played for the national youth team but never became a professional.
examples.chinese: 蒂姆为国家青年队比赛，但从未成为职业选手。

examples.english: Peterson earned a place on the U.S. Olympic speedskating team.
examples.chinese: 彼得森进入了速度滑冰队，代表美国参加奥运会。
