examples.english: They wouldn't let me play in the village under-12 team because I'm a girl.
examples.chinese: 他们不让我参加村里的12岁以下代表队，因为我是个女孩。

examples.english: They are playing today against one of the best sides in the country.
examples.chinese: 今天，他们将与全国最强的队伍之一比赛。

examples.english: I don't know which side I want to win.
examples.chinese: 我也不知道自己希望哪一队赢。

expressions.gram: countable noun with singular or plural verb in British English

examples.english: Vivian McGrath was the star of the 1938 Davis Cup squad.
examples.chinese: 维维安·麦格拉思是1938年戴维斯杯集训队中的明星运动员。

examples.english: Only two starting players are returning from last year's women's basketball squad.
examples.chinese: 去年的女子篮球集训队只有两名首发球员还在队中。

centers.english: a person or group of people you play against
centers.chinese: 与之比赛的个人或小组

examples.english: My opponent was the same age and height as myself.
examples.chinese: 我的对手与我同岁，身高也一样。

examples.english: Karpov defeated his 24-year-old opponent in 57 moves.
examples.chinese: 卡尔波夫用57步棋击败了24岁的对手。

examples.english: Manchester United will prove a formidable opponent this season.
examples.chinese: 本赛季曼联队将证明自己是个难以对付的敌手。

examples.english: The team won all their games against local opposition, but lost in the international competition.
examples.chinese: 该队击败了所有的当地对手，但在国际比赛中却输了。

examples.english: The opposition fought hard, but had no chance of winning.
examples.chinese: 对手奋力拼杀，但已没有获胜的机会了。

examples.english: Seles had reached the semi-finals without really facing any serious opposition.
examples.chinese: 塞莱斯没有真正遇到强劲的对手便进入了半决赛。

centers.english: something you say or write in order to be funny
centers.chinese: 为取乐而说或写的东西

examples.english: Have you heard any good jokes lately?
examples.chinese: 近来你听到过什么精彩的笑话吗?

examples.english: Wilson spoke for about 15 minutes, peppering his mainly serious message with jokes.
examples.chinese: 威尔逊讲了约15分钟，在总体严肃的讲话中穿插了很多笑话。

examples.english: Leno opened the show with a joke about the election.
examples.chinese: 莱诺在节目开始时讲了个有关选举的笑话。

expressions.text: get the joke/ see a joke

examples.english: It wasn't that I didn't get the joke - I just didn't think it was funny.
examples.chinese: 我并不是听不懂那个笑话，我只是不觉得它好笑罢了。

examples.english: Everyone laughed except Mr Broadbent, who didn't see the joke.
examples.chinese: 除了布罗德本特先生，大家都笑了，他没有听懂那笑话。

examples.english: It's a good idea to start a speech by telling a joke.
examples.chinese: 演讲时以讲笑话来作为开场是个很不错的主意。

examples.english: In some situations, a dirty joke can be considered sexual harassment.
examples.chinese: 有些情况下讲下流笑话可被视为性骚扰。

examples.english: The two girls were whispering in the corner and giggling over some private joke.
examples.chinese: 那两个女孩在角落里窃窃私语，说着什么不让外人知道的笑话，格格地笑着。

examples.english: It reminded her of a funny story she'd heard at work.
examples.chinese: 这使她想起了工作时听到的一个引人发笑的故事。

examples.english: He began telling funny stories about the time he worked as a barman on a cruise ship.
examples.chinese: 他开始说起了自己在游轮上当酒吧招待时的趣事。

examples.english: Bob Hope would keep his audience laughing with an endless stream of jokes and wisecracks.
examples.chinese: 鲍勃·霍普会不停地说笑打趣，让听众笑得合不拢口。

examples.english: Amy responded with a wisecrack that got her in big trouble with the teacher.
examples.chinese: 埃美用打趣话作答，使她和老师惹上了大麻烦。

examples.english: There are some memorable one-liners in every Woody Allen film.
examples.chinese: 伍迪·艾伦每一部电影里都有几句让人忘不了的俏皮话。

examples.english: It's a hilarious scene with a succession of brilliant one-liners from Groucho Marx.
examples.chinese: 格劳乔·马克思在这一幕戏中妙语连珠，非常滑稽。

examples.english: His first job was writing gags for a famous comedian.
examples.chinese: 他的第一份工作是给一位著名的滑稽演员写插科打诨的台词。

examples.english: He started the show with a few old gags about mothers-in-law.
examples.chinese: 他在表演一开始时说了几个关于丈母娘的老生常谈的笑话。

examples.english: He got to the end of the joke and couldn't remember the punch line.
examples.chinese: 笑话讲到最后，他竟想不起那句收尾的妙语了。

examples.english: I waited for the punch line, but it never came.
examples.chinese: 我等着听那句结尾妙语，但一直听不到。

examples.english: Have you heard the one about the brown cow who goes into a bar?
examples.chinese: 你听过那个棕色母牛跑进酒吧的笑话了吗？

examples.english: ‘Seven days without food makes one weak’ is a pun on the words ‘week’ and ‘weak’, and also on the different meanings of ‘one’.
examples.chinese: “七天不吃饭使人虚弱”是利用“week〔星期〕”和“weak〔虚弱〕”同音的双关语，而且“one”也有两个不同的意思。

examples.english: The audience groaned at his pun.
examples.chinese: 观众听了他的双关语笑痛了肚子。

examples.english: ‘Pardon the pun, but we were all in the same boat,’ said Navy Lieutenant Green.
examples.chinese: “抱歉我用个双关语，我们大家可是在同舟共济啊。”海军上尉格林说道。

examples.english: Dirty jokes and double meanings are what makes the show funny.
examples.chinese: 这场表演的有趣之处就在于那些下流笑话和猥亵的双关语。

examples.english: The song's lyrics are full of double entendres.
examples.chinese: 这首歌的歌词充满了猥亵的双关语。

centers.english: something that you do to make people laugh

examples.english: We didn't mean to frighten you. It was only a joke.
examples.chinese: 我们并非有意要让你害怕，不过是开个玩笑。

examples.english: Inside the parcel there was an empty bottle. ‘Is this some kind of joke?’ he asked.
examples.chinese: 包裹里有个空瓶子，“这是在开玩笑吧？”他问道。

examples.english: I can take a joke as well as anyone, but this isn't funny, it's embarrassing.
examples.chinese: 我跟大家一样开得起玩笑，但这不好玩，而且让人尴尬。

examples.english: The phone call was the sort of practical joke that radio stations often play on celebrities.
examples.chinese: 这个电话有点像电台常对名人搞的那种恶作剧。

examples.english: Police believe the circles in the crops are made by someone playing an elaborate practical joke.
examples.chinese: 警方认为那些麦田怪圈是某些人精心策划的恶作剧。

examples.english: The fire was started as a prank.
examples.chinese: 这场火灾是由闹着玩引起的。

examples.english: Pushing her in the river seemed like a harmless prank, but it ended in tragedy.
examples.chinese: 把她推入河中似乎是个于人无害的恶作剧，可最终酿成了悲剧。

examples.english: Every year, the older kids pull pranks on new students.
examples.chinese: 每年高年级学生都要对新生搞恶作剧。

examples.english: He didn't seem the type of boy to play jokes.
examples.chinese: 他看起来不像是那种跟人开玩笑的男孩。

examples.english: When she didn't come, I thought she was playing a trick on me.
examples.chinese: 她没来，那时候我觉得她在戏弄我。

expressions.text: as a joke/ for a joke

examples.english: You shouldn't spread rumours like that, even as a joke.
examples.chinese: 你不应那样散布谣言，就算开玩笑也不行。

examples.english: Once, for a joke, they changed round all the numbers on the doors.
examples.chinese: 有一次他们开了个玩笑，把门牌号码全都调换了。

examples.english: Just for a laugh we hung all the pictures upside down.
examples.chinese: 我们开了个玩笑，把画全都倒过来挂。

examples.english: Kevin set off the fire alarm for a laugh.
examples.chinese: 凯文为了博大家一笑拉响了火警钟。

centers.english: to say something to make people laugh

examples.english: Nick cracked a joke to try to ease the tension.
examples.chinese: 尼克开了个玩笑以缓和一下紧张的气氛。

examples.english: My mother makes a joke of just about everything.
examples.chinese: 我妈妈几乎拿任何事都会开开玩笑。

expressions.text: make a joke/crack a joke about

examples.english: This is a serious matter. I wish you wouldn't make jokes about it.
examples.chinese: 这是件很严肃的事情，我希望你不要拿它开玩笑。

examples.english: I tried to cheer him up by telling a joke.
examples.chinese: 我给他讲了个笑话想逗他开心。

examples.english: I'm afraid I'm not very good at telling jokes.
examples.chinese: 恐怕我不善于讲笑话。

examples.english: Pat told them a joke about two flies walking on the ceiling.
examples.chinese: 帕特给他们讲了一个两只苍蝇在天花板上走的笑话。

examples.english: A group of teenagers were standing at the corner, laughing and joking.
examples.chinese: 一群十几岁的青少年站在街角上嘻嘻哈哈地在开玩笑。

examples.english: They're a good class to teach. You can joke and have a laugh with them.
examples.chinese: 教这个班很好，你可以说说笑话，跟他们一起开怀大笑。

examples.english: When he was a kid he was embarrassed about his height, but now he can joke about it.
examples.chinese: 他小时候对自己的身高感到尴尬，但现在他却能拿它开玩笑了。

examples.english: Grable made him mad by wisecracking about his weight.
examples.chinese: 格拉布尔拿他的体重开玩笑，把他气疯了。

examples.english: The president appeared totally relaxed, chatting and wisecracking with reporters.
examples.chinese: 总统看起来非常轻松，与记者们聊着，说着俏皮话。

centers.english: someone who tells jokes or does things to make people laugh
centers.chinese: 讲笑话或做令人发笑的事的人

examples.english: Lenny Henry, the famous British comedian, will appear in a show in London next week.
examples.chinese: 著名英国喜剧演员莱尼·亨利将于下周在伦敦登台表演。

examples.english: Before becoming a film actor, he'd been a comic appearing regularly in cabaret.
examples.chinese: 他成为电影演员之前是一个滑稽演员，经常在卡巴莱歌舞表演中出现。

examples.english: Robin Williams first made his name as a stand-up comedian.
examples.chinese: 罗宾·威廉斯最早是以单人表演的喜剧演员而闻名的。

examples.english: Rochester was well known as a wit in society circles.
examples.chinese: 罗切斯特在社交界是个出名的说话风趣的人。

examples.english: A dozen writers and wits used to gather at the Algonquin Hotel for lunch.
examples.chinese: 很多作家和才子以前常常聚在阿尔贡金酒店用餐。

examples.english: The shop sold toys and gadgets for practical jokers.
examples.chinese: 这家商店售卖玩具和小玩艺给那些爱恶作剧的人。

centers.english: to pretend that something is true as a joke
centers.chinese: 为开玩笑而假装某事是真的

examples.english: When he asked me to marry him I wasn't sure whether he was joking or being serious.
examples.chinese: 他向我求婚时，我说不准他是在开玩笑还是认真的。

examples.english: ‘You're just kidding, right Mom?’ Joe asked anxiously.
examples.chinese: “你只是在开开玩笑吧，是不是啊？妈妈。”乔焦急地问道。

examples.english: Don't get mad - I was only joking!
examples.chinese: 千万别生气，我只是开开玩笑而已！

examples.english: You're kidding. You mean it only rains once a year there?
examples.chinese: 你是在开玩笑吧。你说那里一年只下一次雨？

examples.english: ‘They wanted $425 just for the room.’ ‘Are you kidding?’
examples.chinese: “那个房间他们就要收费425美元。”“你是说着玩的吧？”

examples.english: It was the best pizza I've ever eaten, no kidding.
examples.chinese: 那是我吃过的最棒的比萨饼，不骗你的。

examples.english: She's only sixteen? No kidding? She looks twenty-five.
examples.chinese: 她才16岁？开玩笑吧？她看起来有25岁。

examples.english: Braden jokingly refers to her daughter as ‘the demon.’
examples.chinese: 布雷登戏称她的女儿为“恶魔”。

expressions.text: you're having me on /you're putting me o

examples.english: Come on, you guys, you're putting me on, right?
examples.chinese: 行了，你们这些家伙，在拿我开玩笑吧，是不是？

examples.english: He makes £80,000 a year? You're having me on.
examples.chinese: 他一年挣80,000英镑？你和我开玩笑吧。

examples.english: Is all this really true, or are you pulling my leg?
examples.chinese: 这一切是真的吗，还是你在同我开玩笑？

examples.english: You don't really have to buy tickets. I was just pulling your leg.
examples.chinese: 你不必真的去买票，我只是骗骗你的。

examples.english: I was only winding you up - don't take it so seriously!
examples.chinese: 我只是跟你闹着玩的，别这样当真！

examples.english: What was meant to be a harmless wind-up ended up with the sacking of three men yesterday.
examples.chinese: 原本只是想开开玩笑罢了，并无恶意的，结果却弄到昨天有三个人被开除。

centers.english: not behaving or speaking seriously

examples.english: People ask me if I'm related to him, and my answer is usually a flippant ‘No, but I wish I were.’
examples.chinese: 人们问我是不是与他有亲戚关系，我的回答通常都是半真半假的“没有，可我倒是希望有啊”。

examples.english: When asked what is wrong with the economy, analysts reply ‘Not enough money.’ This answer is not as flippant as it sounds.
examples.chinese: 当问到经济出了什么问题时，分析员回答说“钱不够啊”。这个回答听起来随意，其实不然。

examples.english: Sorry if that sounded flippant or heartless - it wasn't meant to be.
examples.chinese: 如果这听起来有点轻率或无情的话真对不起—那不是故意的。

examples.english: ‘It's only money,’ said Gabriella flippantly. ‘Here today and gone tomorrow!’
examples.chinese: “这只是钱而已。”加布里埃拉满不在乎地说，“今天到手明天就没了！”

examples.english: He gave me a playful slap on the shoulder.
examples.chinese: 他闹着玩地在我肩上拍了一下。

examples.english: She tried to sound playful but somehow the words came out the wrong way.
examples.chinese: 她想用开玩笑的语气说，可不知怎地话说出来就不对劲了。

examples.english: Toby laughed, playfully telling her off.
examples.chinese: 托比笑了，以开玩笑的口吻骂着她。

examples.english: At the risk of sounding facetious, who really cares about what happens?
examples.chinese: 说出来怕被认为是在乱开玩笑，其实谁真的会在乎发生什么事呢?

examples.english: The speech saying drug users should be shot was clearly facetious, but it contained a serious point.
examples.chinese: 讲话中说吸毒者应该被枪毙显然是句玩笑话，但却包含着一个严肃的观点。

examples.english: ‘What would we do without him?’ said Chuck facetiously.
examples.chinese: “没有他我们怎么办？”查克故作诙谐地说。

examples.english: His tongue-in-cheek articles are brilliantly funny and very political.
examples.chinese: 他那些挖苦的文章妙趣横生，而且有强烈的政治意味。

examples.english: ‘This just shows you what a great coach I am,’ said Braden, tongue-in-cheek.
examples.chinese: “这就说明我这个教练有多出色了。”布雷登自嘲道。

centers.english: to exercise your body

examples.english: You should exercise every day and get plenty of fresh air.
examples.chinese: 你应该每天锻炼，多呼吸一点新鲜空气。

examples.english: Even people who start exercising quite late in life notice considerable benefits.
examples.chinese: 就连在晚年才开始锻炼的人也发现好处相当大。

examples.english: A lot of managers spend long hours in their cars and exercise very little.
examples.chinese: 许多经理人员长时间坐在汽车里，很少锻炼。

examples.english: You should do at least fifteen minutes’ exercise each day.
examples.chinese: 你每天应该至少锻炼15分钟。

examples.english: Doctors are always telling us that we should do more exercise.
examples.chinese: 医生总是告诉我们要多运动。

examples.english: Most of the people here never take any exercise at all.
examples.chinese: 这里的大部分人从不做任何运动。

examples.english: A lot of children these days don't get enough exercise.
examples.chinese: 现在许多孩子都运动得不够。

examples.english: Try to increase the amount of exercise you get, perhaps by walking to work.
examples.chinese: 尽量增加运动量，也许可以步行去上班。

examples.english: Professional footballers spend at least an hour every day working out in the gym.
examples.chinese: 职业足球运动员每天至少在健身房锻炼一个小时。

examples.english: I go jogging every morning and work out with weights twice a week.
examples.chinese: 我每天早晨去慢跑，一周还进行两次举重的锻练。

examples.english: Jim gave up drinking and took up tennis in an attempt to keep fit.
examples.chinese: 吉姆为保持身体健康戒了酒，还打起了网球。

examples.english: Many older people find that keeping fit can be fun as well as good for their health.
examples.chinese: 许多老人发现，锻炼身体既有乐趣，又能强身。

examples.english: It's not too late to get into shape before the summer holidays.
examples.chinese: 暑假之前把身体锻炼好也不太迟。

examples.english: If you want to get fit quickly, jogging is one of the best ways.
examples.chinese: 如果你想让身体快点好起来，慢跑是最好的方法之一。

examples.english: It's important to warm up properly before you do any sport.
examples.chinese: 做任何运动之前，做好热身运动是很重要的。

examples.english: The runners are now limbering up as they get ready for the race.
examples.chinese: 赛跑选手现在正在做热身运动，准备比赛。

examples.english: We train twice a week at the local gym.
examples.chinese: 我们在当地的体育馆一周训练两次。

examples.english: I'm not as fit as I should be. I don't train enough.
examples.chinese: 我的身体不够好，因为我锻炼得不够。

centers.english: to exercise a particular part of your body

examples.english: Swimming exercises all the major muscle groups.
examples.chinese: 游泳使全身的主要肌群都得到锻炼。

examples.english: Raise your knee to exercise the upper leg and hip.
examples.chinese: 抬膝，使大腿和臀部得到锻炼。

examples.english: I'd like to tone up my hips, thighs, and stomach
examples.chinese: 我想让臀部、大腿和腹部结实起来。

centers.english: activities for exercising your body

examples.english: The doctor recommended a diet and a programme of exercises to help her lose weight.
examples.chinese: 医生推荐了一个饮食计划和一个运动计划，帮助她减肥。

examples.english: Try a few gentle exercises once or twice a day.
examples.chinese: 做一些轻松的运动，每天一到两次。

examples.english: Thirty minutes of squash gives you as much exercise as an hour of any other game.
examples.chinese: 30分钟壁球的运动量相当于其他任何运动一个小时的运动量。

examples.english: Most people find it more fun doing exercises to music.
examples.chinese: 大多数人觉得随着音乐做运动更有意思。

examples.english: A new medical report has again highlighted the health benefits of regular exercise.
examples.chinese: 一份新的医学报告再一次强调了定期运动对健康的好处。

examples.english: Do not start a programme of strenuous exercise if you have any heart problems.
examples.chinese: 如果心脏有问题就不要安排有剧烈运动的锻炼计划。

examples.english: Start your workout with some gentle stretching exercises.
examples.chinese: 开始锻炼时要先做一些轻柔的伸展运动。

examples.english: I always feel better after a good workout.
examples.chinese: 在好好运动过之后，我总是感到很舒服。

examples.english: Have you ever tried aerobics?
examples.chinese: 你有没有跳过有氧操?

examples.english: My mum's started going to an aerobics class.
examples.chinese: 我妈妈开始去上增氧健身操课了。

examples.english: I do aerobics twice a week.
examples.chinese: 我一星期跳两次有氧操。

examples.english: I started doing keep fit a couple of years ago.
examples.chinese: 我几年之前就开始上健身课了。

examples.english: keep-fit classes for the over 60s
examples.chinese: 60岁以上老人的健身班

examples.english: I do two hours’ training every evening -- an hour running or swimming, and an hour in the gym.
examples.chinese: 我每晚锻炼两小时一—一小时跑步或游泳，一小时在健身房。

examples.english: All the children do football training at least once a week.
examples.chinese: 所有小孩每周至少进行一次足球训练。

examples.english: She's in training for the New York Marathon.
examples.chinese: 她正在为纽约的马拉松比赛进行训练。

examples.english: The sports centre offers such activities as dance classes, aerobics and weight training.
examples.chinese: 体育中心提供的活动包括舞蹈班、有氧操和举重训练。

centers.english: to jump in the air

examples.english: How high can you jump?
examples.chinese: 你能跳多高？

examples.english: The driver jumped clear as his vehicle fell into the river below.
examples.chinese: 汽车快要掉到河中时，司机及时跳了出来。

examples.english: My cat always jumps up onto the table when I'm trying to work.
examples.chinese: 我想工作时，我的猫总要跳上桌来。

examples.english: She jumped down from the wall.
examples.chinese: 她从墙上跳下来。

examples.english: Aziz won the event with a jump of 2 metres.
examples.chinese: 阿基兹跳了两米，赢得了这个项目的冠军。

examples.english: At the back of the stand, Redsox fans were jumping up and down with excitement.
examples.chinese: 看台后面，红袜队的球迷激动得又蹦又跳。

examples.english: Stop jumping up and down -- keep still!
examples.chinese: 别跳上跳下了—安静点！

examples.english: Mary was hopping anxiously from one foot to another.
examples.chinese: 玛丽交换着左右脚急急地单足跳行。

examples.english: It's a game in which you hop around trying to knock the other players over.
examples.chinese: 这是一种单脚跳行试图撞倒其他人的游戏。

examples.english: Can you skip to the other end of the playground.
examples.chinese: 你边走边跳地到操场的另一边去吧。

examples.english: The children went skipping along the path.
examples.chinese: 孩子们蹦蹦跳跳地沿着小路走。

examples.english: He leaped through the window and was gone.
examples.chinese: 他跳出窗就跑掉了。

examples.english: Tessa leaped onto the boat just as it was moving away from the bank.
examples.chinese: 小船正要离岸时，特莎跳了上去。

examples.english: The fish leaped out of the water.
examples.chinese: 那条鱼跃出水面。

examples.english: With a tremendous leap, James managed to catch the ball.
examples.chinese: 詹姆斯一个精彩的鱼跃接住了球。

examples.english: Roger was standing at the edge of the pool ready to dive.
examples.chinese: 罗杰站在泳池边准备跳水。

examples.english: Evan dived off the rock into the sea.
examples.chinese: 埃文从岩石上跳入大海。

examples.english: The pool was deserted, and Lindsey wasted no time before diving in head-first.
examples.chinese: 泳池中空无一人，林赛抓紧时间一头跳入水中。

examples.english: That was a perfect dive.
examples.chinese: 真是完美的一跳。

centers.english: to go over something by jumping

examples.english: The dog jumped the gate and ran away howling.
examples.chinese: 那条狗跃过大门狂吠着跑开了。

examples.english: Ricky jumped across the stream and ran all the way home.
examples.chinese: 里基跳过小溪，一路跑回了家。

examples.english: He raced down the garden and jumped over the wall.
examples.chinese: 他飞快跑到花园，跳过了围墙。

examples.english: I leapt the fence to safety, leaving the dog snarling behind me.
examples.chinese: 我跳过篱笆落到安全的地方，留下那条狗在我身后狂吠。

examples.english: The bartender leapt over the bar and tried to stop the fight.
examples.chinese: 那个酒保跳过柜台试图劝阻打架。

examples.english: He makes vaulting a five foot wall look easy.
examples.chinese: 他跃过五英尺高的墙似乎很容易。

examples.english: Jack vaulted over the railings.
examples.chinese: 杰克用手一撑跃过了栏杆。

examples.english: He cleared the first two obstacles, but hit the top of the third.
examples.chinese: 他干净利落地跃过头两个障碍，但踢到了第三个障碍的顶端。

examples.english: There was a sprinkling of applause as the horses cleared the last fence.
examples.chinese: 当马匹跃过最后一道栅栏时，零零星星地响起了一些掌声。

centers.english: people of a particular race or nationality

examples.english: People should be treated equally, regardless of their race, age, or sex.
examples.chinese: 人们应该平等相待，不分种族、年龄或性别。

examples.english: people of all races and religions
examples.chinese: 各种族和宗教的人

examples.english: Studies are under way to find out why men of some races are more prone to some forms of cancer than others.
examples.chinese: 对为何有些种族的男性比其他种族的更容易患某些类型的癌症，目前正在进行研究。

examples.english: The group is working to improve race relations in our cities.
examples.chinese: 该团体正致力于改善我们城市中的种族关系。

examples.english: People of all colors and nationalities were at the ceremony.
examples.chinese: 不同肤色、不同国籍的人都参加了这次庆典活动。

examples.english: You can't judge people by the colour of their skin.
examples.chinese: 你不能根据肤色来判断人。

examples.english: I couldn't tell her ethnicity from her last name.
examples.chinese: 我无法根据她的姓说出她是什么种族的。

examples.english: Ethnicity should not be a factor in hiring decisions.
examples.chinese: 种族不应成为用人决策的决定因素。

examples.english: The Bay Area is a place where people of many ethnicities live together in relative harmony.
examples.chinese: 海湾区有许多不同种族的人比较和谐地生活在一起。

examples.english: The Indonesians of the city form a distinct ethnic group.
examples.chinese: 城里的印度尼西亚人形成一个截然不同的族群。

examples.english: In the large cities of Africa, where different ethnic groups with many different languages are thrown together, people communicate in English or Swahili.
examples.chinese: 非洲的大城市里居住着不同的民族，说着许多不同的语言，大家就用英语或斯瓦希里语沟通。

examples.english: fighting in Bosnia between people from different ethnic backgrounds
examples.chinese: 不同种族背景的人之间在波斯尼亚进行的战斗

examples.english: In California it is illegal to refuse to do business with someone because of their race or ethnic origin.
examples.chinese: 在加州，因某人的种族或民族出身而拒绝和他做生意是违法的。

examples.english: There is probably no major public university campus quite as racially and ethnically diverse as the University of California.
examples.chinese: 在主要的公立大学中，也许没有哪一所能像加州大学那样容纳了这么多不同种族和民族的学生。

centers.english: relating to race

examples.english: Some people complained of racial discrimination in the way housing was allocated.
examples.chinese: 有些人投诉在分配住宅的方式上有种族歧视。

examples.english: Racial violence used to be commonplace on the streets of the city.
examples.chinese: 过去种族暴力在该城的街头是司空见惯的。

examples.english: In Jamaica black and white people have lived together in racial harmony for many years.
examples.chinese: 在牙买加，黑人和白人多年来一直和谐共处。

examples.english: Local police deny that have used racial profiling when stopping motorists.
examples.chinese: 当地警察否认在拦下驾车者检查时带有种族歧视。

examples.english: Kolbe grew up a vibrant, racially integrated quarter of Cape Town.
examples.chinese: 科勒贝慢慢发展成开普敦的一个充满活力、各种族关系融洽的地区。

examples.english: Police suspect that the attack could be racially motivated.
examples.chinese: 警方怀疑这次袭击事件可能是由种族问题引致的。

examples.english: Hundreds of people have been killed in the recent ethnic violence.
examples.chinese: 在最近一次种族暴力事件中有数百人丧生。

examples.english: Ethnic unrest is spreading throughout the south-western republics of the former Soviet Union.
examples.chinese: 种族骚乱正波及前苏联西南部的各共和国。

examples.english: Reports of ethnic cleansing in former Yugoslavia forced the European states and the US into taking action.
examples.chinese: 关于该国种族清洗的报道迫使欧洲国家和美国采取行动。

examples.english: Britain became a multiracial society in the 1960s and 70s, after large-scale immigration from the West Indies and the Indian subcontinent.
examples.chinese: 20世纪60年代和70年代，西印度群岛和印度次大陆的人大规模移民到英国，使英国成了一个多种族社会。

examples.english: a vibrant, multicultural neighborhood
examples.chinese: 一个生机勃勃、多元文化的街区

examples.english: The danger of an interracial war in South Africa still exists.
examples.chinese: 在南非，种族战争的危险依然存在。

examples.english: There has to be fairness and justice for black people before you can achieve a spirit of interracial harmony.
examples.chinese: 若想达到种族和睦，就必须平等公正地对待黑人。

examples.english: Interracial marriages are common in England these days.
examples.chinese: 如今在英格兰，种族间通婚是很普遍的。

examples.english: Istanbul is a great cosmopolitan city, situated between East and West.
examples.chinese: 伊斯坦布尔是一个国际大都市，坐落在东西方之间。

examples.english: She grew up in an apartment in a cosmopolitan district of Chicago.
examples.chinese: 她在芝加哥一个国际性区域的一套公寓里长大。

examples.english: The thing I like most about living in London is that it's so cosmopolitan.
examples.chinese: 住在伦敦令我最喜欢的是这座城市非常国际性。

examples.english: Mixed marriages are becoming more and more commonplace.
examples.chinese: 不同种族间通婚越来越普遍了。

centers.english: when people are treated badly because of their race
centers.chinese: 人们因种族原因而受到不好的对待

examples.english: The company has been accused of racism after firing three Algerian workers.
examples.chinese: 该公司因解雇了三名阿尔及利亚工人而被指责有种族歧视。

examples.english: the struggle against racism in our society
examples.chinese: 我们社会中反对种族偏见的斗争

examples.english: Institutionalized racism pervaded British society, and immigrant workers found themselves in unskilled jobs and with low social status.
examples.chinese: 习以为常的种族歧视在英国社会盛行，外来移民工人发觉自己都在做非技术性工作，社会地位低下。

examples.english: racist attitudes
examples.chinese: 种族主义态度

examples.english: a comedian well known for his racist and sexist jokes
examples.chinese: 一个以其带有种族歧视和性别歧视的笑话而出名的喜剧演员

examples.english: An African-American friend told me that she is subjected to racist behavior every day - at work, in the mall, in the park.
examples.chinese: 一名非裔美国朋友告诉我，她每天都受到种族歧视的对待—在工作场所、在商场内、在公园里都是如此。

centers.english: someone who believes that their race is better than other races
centers.chinese: 认为自己的种族比其他种族优越的人

examples.english: The minister denied that he was a racist, but called for tougher controls on immigration.
examples.chinese: 部长否认自己是种族主义者，但要求对移民实施更强硬的控制。

examples.english: racist organizations like the British National Party and Combat 18
examples.chinese: 像英国民族党和十八战斗团这样的种族主义团体

examples.english: Many white supremacists have chosen to set up compounds in unpopulated areas of the American West.
examples.chinese: 许多白人至上主义者选择在美国西部无人居住的地区建立聚居地。

centers.english: when people of different races come together or are kept apart
centers.chinese: 不同种族的人融合或隔离

examples.english: In the 1960s the government passed a law to promote racial integration in schools.
examples.chinese: 20世纪60年代政府通过一项法令，以促进学校里的种族融合。

examples.english: Members of extreme right wing parties are completely opposed to the integration of blacks into white South African society.
examples.chinese: 极端右翼党派的成员完全反对让黑人融入南非的白人社会。

examples.english: Aru was a perfectly integrated society. one in which all the different races lived and worked together peacefully.
examples.chinese: 阿鲁是一个各种族完全融合的社会。

examples.english: The US Supreme Court ruled in 1954 that segregation in schools was unconstitutional.
examples.chinese: 美国最高法院在1954年裁定在学校内实行种族隔离是违反宪法的。

examples.english: Legal segregation may be gone, but the idea of segregation survives, as middle class black families shun white areas, preferring to live in suburbs of their own.
examples.chinese: 法律上的种族隔离也许是不存在了，但种族隔离的观念仍未消失，黑人中产阶级家庭会避开白人住宅区，宁愿住在自己人聚居的郊区。

examples.english: Segregated restaurants are no longer allowed.
examples.chinese: 餐厅不得再实行种族隔离。

centers.english: COMPETITION

examples.english: He was awarded first prize in the National Poetry Competition.
examples.chinese: 他获得全国诗歌竞赛冠军。

examples.english: A spelling bee is a competition in which people try to correctly spell words.
examples.chinese: 单词拼写比赛就是要尽可能将单词拼写正确。

examples.english: A student from St. Paul won the speechwriting competition.
examples.chinese: 一名来自圣保罗的学生在演讲稿撰写比赛中获胜。

examples.english: Enter our free competition and win a weekend in Paris.
examples.chinese: 免费参赛，赢取巴黎周末游。

examples.english: They're holding a competition to come up with a name for the new bridge.
examples.chinese: 他们在举行为新桥取名的比赛。

examples.english: The company developing the site had held a competition to find a master-planner.
examples.chinese: 该地的开发商在举行比赛，以决定主设计师人选。

examples.english: The sixth game of the World Chess Championship will be broadcast tonight on Channel 6.
examples.chinese: 世界国际象棋锦标赛的第六局将于今晚在6频道播出。

examples.english: At 17, he was the youngest player to win the Men's Tennis Championship.
examples.chinese: 17岁时，他成为男子网球锦标赛最年轻的冠军。

examples.english: Gutierrez said he has a plan he hopes will carry him through to his first world championship.
examples.chinese: 古铁雷斯说他有个计划，希望能帮自己获得首个世界冠军称号。

examples.english: an international golf tournament
examples.chinese: 一场国际高尔夫球锦标赛

examples.english: There's a volleyball tournament at Sunset Park which begins today.
examples.chinese: 日落公园有一场排球锦标赛，今天开赛。

examples.english: Telford won the local five-a-side football tournament.
examples.chinese: 特尔福德队在当地五人制足球锦标赛中获胜。

examples.english: The event, held every four years in Fort Worth, Texas, is the country's leading piano contest.
examples.chinese: 该赛事每四年在得克萨斯的沃思堡举行一次，是该国最重要的钢琴比赛。

examples.english: Jake always enters the arm-wrestling contest at the local fair.
examples.chinese: 杰克常在当地游乐场参加掰腕子比赛。

examples.english: Harriet decided to enter Henry in the cute baby contest.
examples.chinese: 哈丽雅特决定让亨利参加可爱宝宝比赛。

examples.english: Jack always wins the pub's karaoke contest.
examples.chinese: 杰克总是在酒吧卡拉OK赛中获胜。

examples.english: She won several beauty contests when she was in her early twenties.
examples.chinese: 她20岁出头时数次在选美比赛中获胜。

centers.english: to take part in a competition, sports event etc

examples.english: Any child between the ages of 8 and 12 is allowed to compete.
examples.chinese: 8至12岁的所有小孩都允许参赛。

examples.english: Athletes from 197 countries competed in the Olympic Games in Atlanta.
examples.chinese: 来自197个国家的运动员参加了亚特兰大奥运会。

examples.english: Bailey has competed against athletes half his age and won.
examples.chinese: 贝利曾与比他年龄小一半的运动员同台竞技，结果赢了。

expressions.text: contest the final/the US Open/the election etc

examples.english: In 1991 White contested the US Open and the J G Scott Trophy.
examples.chinese: 1991年，怀特参加了美国公开赛和斯科特杯赛。

examples.english: The leadership election will be contested by four candidates.
examples.chinese: 四名候选人将参加领导人选举。

examples.english: a hotly contested Democratic primary
examples.chinese: 竞争激烈的民主党候选人初选

examples.english: It's a 10-kilometer race from downtown to the river.
examples.chinese: 比赛路线从市中心到河边，赛程为10公里。

examples.english: the Breeder's Cup races at Churchill Downs
examples.chinese: 在丘吉尔唐斯举行的养马人杯赛

examples.english: He's won three races in a row, using the same car and the same engine.
examples.chinese: 他驾驶同一辆车，使用同一台发动机，一连赢得三场比赛。

examples.english: Krystal has already qualified for the hundred-metre race in the Olympics next year.
examples.chinese: 克丽丝特尔已经取得明年奥运会百米赛跑的参赛资格。

centers.english: to try to do better than another person or organization
centers.chinese: 努力比别人或别的组织做得好

examples.english: Nowadays we have to compete more and more with foreign companies.
examples.chinese: 如今，我们必须与外国公司展开越来越广泛的竞争。

examples.english: The cities are competing against each other to attract and retain business.
examples.chinese: 那些城市在相互竞争，以吸引并留住商家。

examples.english: Children will always compete for their parents’ attention.
examples.chinese: 孩子们常常会争着吸引父母的注意。

examples.english: Small independent bookstores just can't compete with national chains and online retailers.
examples.chinese: 小型独立书店就是竞争不过全国性连锁书店和网上经销商。

examples.english: Fujitsu, Hitachi, and NEC are competing with US firms to build the world's fastest supercomputer.
examples.chinese: 富士通、日立和日本电气在与美国公司竞争，以建造世界上最快的超级计算机。

examples.english: If you want the job, you'll have to fight for it.
examples.chinese: 你要是想得到这个工作，就得努力争取。

examples.english: Williams fought several rivals for the leadership of the party.
examples.chinese: 威廉斯与几位对手争夺党的领导权。

examples.english: The two political factions are vying for control of the school board.
examples.chinese: 两个政治派别在争夺地方教育委员会的控制权。

examples.english: Paris and Milan vie with each other for the title of world fashion capital.
examples.chinese: 巴黎和米兰争夺世界时装之都的称号。

examples.english: The company had pitted itself against the giants of the computer industry in an attempt to increase its share of the market.
examples.chinese: 该公司曾与计算机行业巨人竞争，以增加市场份额。

examples.english: On the quiz show ordinary people pit their wits against a panel of celebrities.
examples.chinese: 问答节目中，普通人与一群名人斗智。

centers.english: a situation in which people try to do better than each other

examples.english: Competition for these jobs is very tough - we had over 200 applicants.
examples.chinese: 这些职位竞争相当激烈—有两百多名申请人。

examples.english: There's a lot of competition between the big supermarket chains.
examples.chinese: 大型连锁超级市场竞争激烈。

examples.english: Today television networks face increasing competition from cable programming.
examples.chinese: 如今，电视广播公司面临着有线节目与日俱增的挑战。

examples.english: There is fierce competition for places on the Olympic team.
examples.chinese: 入选奥运会参赛队的竞争激烈。

examples.english: Hotels in the downtown area were in direct competition with each other.
examples.chinese: 市中心区的酒店短兵相接，相互竞争。

examples.english: Weak management and cut-throat competition put the company out of business.
examples.chinese: 管理不力以及激烈的竞争使该公司关门歇业。

examples.english: Amanda hated working in advertising - it was so competitive.
examples.chinese: 阿曼达不喜欢从事广告业—竞争太激烈了。

examples.english: The atmosphere at our school was highly competitive.
examples.chinese: 我们学校笼罩着激烈竞争的气氛。

examples.english: In such a fiercely competitive environment, it's inevitable that some companies will go out of business.
examples.chinese: 在竞争如此激烈的环境中，一些公司会不可避免地被淘汰掉。

examples.english: Holmes says that the rivalry between the two companies has been exaggerated.
examples.chinese: 霍姆斯说，那两家公司之间的竞争被夸大了。

examples.english: There was an intense rivalry between the Brazilian and Italian teams.
examples.chinese: 巴西队和意大利队竞争极为激烈。

examples.english: Just because sibling rivalry is normal doesn't mean you should ignore it.
examples.chinese: 只是因为兄弟姐妹间的较量常见并不等于说应该忽视这个现象。

examples.english: The President's advisors were engaged in a fierce battle for power.
examples.chinese: 总统的顾问们正在进行激烈的权力斗争。

examples.english: The fight for the construction contract is getting more bitter by the day.
examples.chinese: 建筑合同的争夺一天比一天激烈。

examples.english: The Socialist candidate beat the Liberal in a straight fight.
examples.chinese: 社会党候选人在一轮直接交锋中击败了自由党候选人。

examples.english: He lost to Pfeiffer in last year's mayoral race.
examples.chinese: 在去年的市长选举中，他输给了法伊弗。

examples.english: the arms race
examples.chinese: 军备竞赛

examples.english: In the race for the White House, candidates will promise almost anything.
examples.chinese: 总统候选人为了入主白宫，几乎什么事都会答应。

examples.english: The race is on to find a cure for AIDS, and drug companies have already invested millions in research.
examples.chinese: 寻求艾滋病疗法的竞争已拉开序幕，医药公司已投入数百万元的研究资金。

examples.english: I'm tired of the rat race - I'm tired of never getting ahead.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌没完没了的激烈竞争——我讨厌永无获胜之时。

examples.english: Sunday I just try to relax because Monday morning, it's back to the rat race.
examples.chinese: 星期天我尽量休息，因为星期一早上又要没完没了地奔忙了。

centers.english: someone who takes part in a competition

examples.english: Two of the competitors failed to turn up for the first race.
examples.chinese: 两名选手未能参加第一场赛跑。

examples.english: Each of these competitors has their eye on the £50,000 prize money.
examples.chinese: 每一位选手都盯着那五万英镑奖金。

examples.english: The next contestant is Alice Myers from Vancouver.
examples.chinese: 下一位选手是来自温哥华的艾利斯·迈尔斯。

examples.english: Each contestant has to answer questions on a variety of subjects.
examples.chinese: 每个参赛者都必须回答多门学科的问题。

centers.english: people who are trying to do better than each other
centers.chinese: 试图比别人做得更好的人

examples.english: Their major competitors are IBM and Sun Microsystems.
examples.chinese: 他们的主要竞争对手是国际商业机器公司和太阳计算机系统公司。

examples.english: If we're going to succeed, we'll have to provide something that our competitors don't.
examples.chinese: 如果我们想要成功，就必须提供别无我有的产品。

examples.english: The two teams have always been rivals.
examples.chinese: 这两支队是老对手了。

examples.english: The fight started as an argument between rival gang members.
examples.chinese: 这场斗殴起源于对立的帮派成员之间的争执。

examples.english: Our sales figures are 10% ahead of the competition.
examples.chinese: 我们的销售额比所有的竞争对手都要高10%。

examples.english: The team overcame strong competition to gain their place in the finals.
examples.chinese: 该队战胜了强劲的对手进入决赛。

centers.english: someone who likes competing

examples.english: I hate playing tennis with Stephen - he's too competitive.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌和斯蒂芬打网球，他太好胜了。

centers.english: to win a race, competition etc

examples.english: No-one really expected the Socialist Party to win.
examples.chinese: 没有人预期社会党获胜。

examples.english: Chang won the first set but lost the next two.
examples.chinese: 常赢了第一局，但是接下来连输两局。

examples.english: The competition was won by a Nigerian student.
examples.chinese: 这场比赛获胜者是一个尼日利亚学生。

examples.english: His book won the Pulitzer Prize for literature.
examples.chinese: 他的书赢得普利策文学奖。

examples.english: What would you do if you won $1 million?
examples.chinese: 要是你赢得一百万美元会做什么?

examples.english: He went ahead of Nolan, winning by 15 seconds.
examples.chinese: 他跑在诺兰前面，领先15秒获胜。

examples.english: Do you remember our first game of the season? We won 3-1.
examples.chinese: 你还记得那个赛季我们的第一场比赛吗？我们以3-1获胜。

examples.english: She always wins at Scrabble.
examples.chinese: 她玩拼字游戏总是赢的。

expressions.text: finish first/be first/come in first/ come first

examples.english: Who do you think will finish first?
examples.chinese: 你认为谁会得第一名?

examples.english: The British team was first, followed closely by the Americans.
examples.chinese: 英国队赢得第一，美国队紧随其后。

examples.english: André Etienne came in first, having completed the course in record time.
examples.chinese: 安德烈·艾蒂安赢得第一，以有史以来最快的时间跑完了全程。

expressions.text: finish first/be first/come in first in

examples.english: An Australian runner came first in the marathon.
examples.chinese: 一位澳大利亚选手在马拉松赛跑中得了第一名。

examples.english: Sue finished first in two races -- the 50m backstroke and the 100m front crawl.
examples.chinese: 休在50米仰泳和100米自由泳这两场比赛中获得第一。

examples.english: Johnson finished in first place, narrowly ahead of Green.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊得了第一名，只比格林快一点点。

examples.english: My greatest achievement was winning first place in the Young Artist competition.
examples.chinese: 我最大的成就是在青年艺术家比赛中获得第一。

expressions.gram: intransitive phrasal verb not in progressive

examples.english: Do you think Labour will get in again at the next election?
examples.chinese: 你认为工党在下一届选举中会再次当选吗？

centers.english: to win an argument, fight, war, etc
centers.chinese: 在辩论、打斗、战争等中获胜

examples.english: The court case has been dragging on for months, and it's increasingly unlikely that she'll win.
examples.chinese: 这场官司拖拉了好几个月，她越来越不可能赢了。

examples.english: I could never win an argument with my father.
examples.chinese: 我永远也争论不过爸爸。

examples.english: Who won the first Civil War?
examples.chinese: 谁赢了第一次内战？

examples.english: This was the first of many victories won by women's rights campaigners.
examples.chinese: 这是女权运动者许多次胜利中的第一次。

examples.english: In a survey of customer preference, one model came consistently out on top.
examples.chinese: 在顾客喜好调查中，有一个型号一直胜出。

examples.english: In all action movies, the hero always comes out on top.
examples.chinese: 所有动作片中，英雄人物总会胜出。

examples.english: Fortunately, in this case, common sense has prevailed.
examples.chinese: 幸运的是，在这件事中常理占了上风。

examples.english: She seems to think that animal rights should prevail over everything else.
examples.chinese: 她似乎认为动物的权利应当高于一切。

examples.english: Anti-gun campaigners feel they have enough support to carry the day in tomorrow's vote.
examples.chinese: 反枪支运动者认为他们有足够的支持，能在明天的投票中获胜。

examples.english: His appeal to reason and common sense was what finally carried the day.
examples.chinese: 诉诸理性和常理是他最终取胜的原因。

examples.english: On this occasion the strikers won the day and were given a pay increase of 20%.
examples.chinese: 这一回罢工者最终得胜，获加薪30%。

centers.english: to be winning a game, race etc that has not yet finished
centers.chinese: 比赛、赛跑等未结束时领先

examples.english: Senna was winning when the race was brought to a halt because of a crash.
examples.chinese: 比赛因撞车暂停时，塞纳正领先。

examples.english: It looked as though Bush was winning the election battle.
examples.chinese: 看样子布什似乎在选战中领先。

examples.english: The High School team were leading with 60 points.
examples.chinese: 高中队以60分领先。

examples.english: The Dolphins are still in the lead with only 2 minutes left to play.
examples.chinese: 离完场只有3分钟，海豚队仍处于领先地位。

examples.english: Agassi was leading by two sets when rain stopped play.
examples.chinese: 因下雨终止比赛时，阿加西领先两局。

examples.english: She was still ahead in the polls just a week before the election.
examples.chinese: 就在大选前一周，她在民意调查中仍然领先。

examples.english: Waylan was ahead of Miller by three shots.
examples.chinese: 韦兰领先米勒三球。

examples.english: Shortly afterwards Smith put the Dodgers ahead with a stunning home run.
examples.chinese: 随后不久，史密斯以一个惊人的本垒打使道奇队得以领先。

examples.english: Damon Hill is now 14 points ahead of his nearest rival.
examples.chinese: 达蒙·希尔现在领先紧追其后的对手14分。

examples.english: By the final lap, Molly was way ahead of all the other girls.
examples.chinese: 最后一圈时，莫莉遥遥领先于其他女孩子。

expressions.text: be ahead by 12 points/5 games etc

examples.english: Houston was ahead by 3 points at half-time.
examples.chinese: 中场时，休斯顿队领先3分。

centers.english: to win easily

examples.english: Everyone expected the Democrats to win easily.
examples.chinese: 大家都预料民主党会轻松得胜。

examples.english: She won the race easily with seconds to spare.
examples.chinese: 她领先好几秒，轻松地赢了赛跑。

examples.english: The Socialists will win hands down if the election is free and fair.
examples.chinese: 如果这次选举是自由、公正的，那么社会党将会轻易取胜。

examples.english: The newer model wins hands down when it comes to speed and capacity.
examples.chinese: 从速度和功率来说，这款较新的型号无出其右。

examples.english: In the end it was no contest. New Labour won more votes than even they thought possible.
examples.chinese: 最终是所向披靡，新工党获得的票数甚至超出了他们自己的预料。

examples.english: United have established a clear lead, and are threatening to run away with the championship.
examples.chinese: 联队明显领先，大有轻易获胜之势。

examples.english: He looked like a shoo-in to win South Carolina's Republican presidential primary.
examples.chinese: 他似乎稳操胜券，能在南卡罗来纳州共和党总统候选人初选中胜出。

examples.english: Olson scored twice as the Rams swept to victory.
examples.chinese: 奥尔森两次得分，使公羊队大获全胜。

examples.english: Nixon swept to victory by 47 million votes to 29 million.
examples.chinese: 尼克松以4,700万比3,900万的票数大获全胜。

examples.english: No goals were scored in the first half but Spurs romped home in the second, scoring four.
examples.chinese: 上半场没有入球，但下半场热刺队进了四球，轻易获胜。

centers.english: to win when you almost lost

examples.english: We won the debate by a narrow margin.
examples.chinese: 这场辩论我们勉强取胜。

examples.english: Winning by a narrow margin, the Lakers now go on to play in the championships.
examples.chinese: 湖人队险胜之后，继而在总决赛中打下去。

examples.english: The Green Party scraped home in the local elections.
examples.chinese: 在地区选举中，绿党险胜。

examples.english: The referees decided that Foreman had just scraped home.
examples.chinese: 裁判判福尔曼勉强获胜。

expressions.text: be close/ be a close-run thing

examples.english: The election was very close - a handful of votes decided it.
examples.chinese: 这次选举势均力敌，只有几票之差。

examples.english: The champions have kept their title, but it was a close-run thing.
examples.chinese: 冠军们保住了他们的名次，但这是一次险胜。

centers.english: when someone wins

examples.english: The crowds were celebrating Italy's victory.
examples.chinese: 人群在庆祝意大利队的胜利。

examples.english: We're very confident of victory.
examples.chinese: 我们对获胜很有信心。

examples.english: victory celebrations
examples.chinese: 胜利庆祝活动

examples.english: Their 2-1 victory over the Australians was completely unexpected.
examples.chinese: 他们以2比1战胜澳大利亚队完全出乎意料。

examples.english: He had won a comfortable victory in the general election.
examples.chinese: 他在大选中轻松获胜。

examples.english: It was an important win for Manchester United.
examples.chinese: 这是曼联队的一场重大胜利。

examples.english: A couple from London are celebrating a big lottery win.
examples.chinese: 一对来自伦敦的夫妇在庆祝中了大笔彩金。

examples.english: a 2-0 win over their oldest rivals
examples.chinese: 2比0战胜他们最老的对手

examples.english: Despite many local triumphs, their party stands little chance of winning a national election.
examples.chinese: 他们的党尽管在许多地方选举中取得胜利，但是在全国性选举中获胜的机会不大。

examples.english: Arsenal's recent League Cup triumph.
examples.chinese: 阿森纳队最近在联盟杯上的胜利

examples.english: With such a strong team, France are heading for certain success.
examples.chinese: 法国队实力如此强大，肯定会在比赛中取胜。

examples.english: their fourth success in a row
examples.chinese: 他们连续第四次的胜利

examples.english: The palace was built in Cordoba, Spain, following the Arab conquest.
examples.chinese: 阿拉伯战胜之后，把宫殿建造在西班牙的科尔多瓦。

examples.english: The Roman legions left, opening the way for the conquest of the British Isles by the Germanic tribes.
examples.chinese: 罗马军团撤退，给日耳曼部族开辟了征服不列颠群岛的道路。

examples.english: If they were expecting this game to be a walkover, they were very wrong.
examples.chinese: 他们要是以为这是场轻易取胜的比赛，那就大错特错了。

examples.english: The newspapers were predicting a landslide for Thatcher.
examples.chinese: 各报纸都预言撒切尔将获得一面倒的胜利。

examples.english: He was re-elected in 1984 by a landslide.
examples.chinese: 1984年，他以压倒性多数再次当选。

examples.english: Few people had expected Labour's landslide victory in 1945.
examples.chinese: 1945年，几乎没有人预料到工党的一面倒胜利。

centers.english: the person or team that wins

examples.english: The winner will receive a prize of $500.
examples.chinese: 获胜者会得到500美元奖金。

examples.english: The crowd roared as the winner crossed the finishing line.
examples.chinese: 获胜者跨过终点线时，人群欢呼起来。

examples.english: On Thursday the judges will be announcing the winner of this year's Booker Prize.
examples.chinese: 星期四，评审团将宣布本年度的布克奖得主。

examples.english: Mohammed Ali, the former world heavyweight boxing champion, will appear on the ‘Tonight’ show next week.
examples.chinese: 前世界重量级拳击冠军穆罕默德·阿里将出现在下周的《今夜》节目里。

examples.english: As defending champion, he is expected to reach the final.
examples.chinese: 作为卫冕冠军，他预计会进入决赛。

examples.english: Bjorn Borg was the reigning Wimbledon champion for five years.
examples.chinese: 比约恩·博格是温布尔登网球赛连续五年的冠军。

examples.english: The winning team will go through to the grand final in London.
examples.chinese: 获胜队将进入在伦敦举行的大决赛。

examples.english: A group of reporters followed the winning jockey and horse into the winner's enclosure.
examples.chinese: 一群记者跟随获胜的骑师和赛马进入领奖区。

examples.english: After the war, the victors returned in triumph.
examples.chinese: 战后，胜利者凯旋而归。

examples.english: The victors are waving to the crowd as they do their lap of honour.
examples.chinese: 获胜者向人群挥着手绕场一周欢庆胜利。

examples.english: He shook hands with his victorious opponent.
examples.chinese: 他与获胜的对手握手。

examples.english: Three young men from the victorious team came forward to collect their trophy.
examples.chinese: 获胜队有三名年轻男子上前领取奖杯。

centers.english: to be the person or team that is expected to win

examples.english: The Danish runner was the favorite for the 100m sprint.
examples.chinese: 丹麦选手是100米短跑中最有希望获胜的人。

examples.english: Thatcher was favourite to win the 1983 election.
examples.chinese: 撒切尔最有希望在1983年的选举中获胜。

examples.english: The Luxembourg entry is clear favourite to win the Eurovision Song Contest.
examples.chinese: 在这次欧洲歌曲电视大奖赛中，卢森堡的参赛选手显然最有希望获胜。

examples.english: He will certainly be a frontrunner in the Democratic primaries.
examples.chinese: 他肯定会在民主党初选中领先。

examples.english: The Greens have never really been among the frontrunners in British politics.
examples.chinese: 绿党在英国的政坛上从未真正领先过。

examples.english: Spain still has several athletes in the running.
examples.chinese: 西班牙还有好几个运动员可能获胜。

examples.english: Anthony Hopkins was in the running for an Oscar.
examples.chinese: 安东尼·霍普金斯正在角逐奥斯卡奖。

centers.english: something that you get when you win

examples.english: The prize is a 3-week holiday in the Bahamas.
examples.chinese: 奖品是巴哈马三周游。

examples.english: Second prize is a book token.
examples.chinese: 二等奖是一张购书礼券。

examples.english: She won the Booker Prize for her novel ‘The Blind Assassin’.
examples.chinese: 她的《盲眼刺客》一书赢得布克奖。

examples.english: A list of prize winners will appear in net week's issue.
examples.chinese: 获奖名单将在下周的一期刊登。

examples.english: The Queen presented the cup to the captain of the winning team.
examples.chinese: 女王把奖杯颁发给获胜队的队长。

examples.english: The winning team went up to collect their medals
examples.chinese: 获胜队上前领取奖牌。

examples.english: The gold medal was won by Anna Svensen.
examples.chinese: 金牌由安娜·斯文森赢得。

examples.english: The winner went to receive her trophy.
examples.chinese: 获胜者过去领她的奖杯。

examples.english: They became the first British team to win a major European trophy.
examples.chinese: 他们成为第一支赢得欧洲重要奖杯的英国球队。

examples.english: The jackpot is worth $1 million this week.
examples.chinese: 这一周的巨额奖金值100万美元。

examples.english: Unemployed roadsweeper Mickey Reid hit the jackpot when his £4 Lotto ticket won him £1.8m.
examples.chinese: 失业的马路清洁工米基·里德中了头奖，他买的4英镑乐透彩票赢了180万英镑。

examples.english: She collected her winnings and put them into her bag.
examples.chinese: 她收起赢来的钱放进包里。

examples.english: Scooping up his winnings, he went off to invest them at the blackjack table.
examples.chinese: 他抓起赢来的钱，去投在玩21点的赌桌上。

centers.english: to beat someone in a game, competition, election etc
centers.chinese: 在比赛、竞争、竞选等中打败某人

examples.english: Do you think the Socialists will beat the Liberals in the election?
examples.chinese: 你认为社会党能在大选中击败自由党吗？

examples.english: Brazil beat Italy in the final.
examples.chinese: 巴西队在决赛中击败了意大利队。

examples.english: Lewis was a tough boxer, and a hard man to beat.
examples.chinese: 刘易斯是个很难对付的拳击手，也是个难以打败的人。

examples.english: My Father used to let me beat him at chess.
examples.chinese: 父亲以前和我下棋时常让我赢。

expressions.text: beat somebody by 20 points/5 seconds/50 votes etc

examples.english: The Swedish runner beat the Canadian by just under two seconds.
examples.chinese: 瑞典选手仅以领先不到两秒钟的优势击败了加拿大选手。

examples.english: The Red Sox beat the Yankees 6-3.
examples.chinese: 红袜队以6比3击败了洋基队。

examples.english: For the sixth consecutive year, Oxford defeated Cambridge today in the annual boat race.
examples.chinese: 在今天举行的一年一度的划船比赛中，牛津大学连续第六年击败了剑桥大学。

examples.english: Polk of California was defeated by a Democratic challenger in the last election.
examples.chinese: 在最后一次竞选中，加州的波尔克被民主党的一位挑战者击败。

expressions.text: defeat somebody by 20 points/two goals to one etc

examples.english: Sanchez defeated Dornan by just 984 votes.
examples.chinese: 桑切斯仅以984票的优势击败了多南。

examples.english: She's determined not to let Smith, her fiercest rival, get the better of her.
examples.chinese: 她决心不让最难以应付的对手史密斯战胜她。

expressions.text: be more than a match for

examples.english: I thought I might beat Tracy at tennis but she was more than a match for me.
examples.chinese: 我本以为在网球赛中能击败特蕾西，没想到她远比我强。

examples.english: The Russian president has once again proved more than a match for his political adversaries.
examples.chinese: 这位俄罗斯总统再一次证明了他比自己的政治对手要强得多。

centers.english: to beat someone very easily in a game, competition, election etc
centers.chinese: 在比赛、竞争、选举等中轻易地击败某人

examples.english: Wow, the Raiders just slaughtered the Seahawks again.
examples.chinese: 哇！突袭者队又一次击溃海鹰队。

examples.english: The party strategy was to form an alliance to crush the communists.
examples.chinese: 该党的战略是组成同盟彻底击败敌人。

examples.english: We've been clobbered twice now by Central High's basketball team.
examples.chinese: 我们已有两次被中央高中篮球队打得溃不成军。

examples.english: Chicago hammered Boston in an away game on Saturday.
examples.chinese: 芝加哥队在星期六的一场客场比赛中轻易击败了波士顿队。

examples.english: ‘How'd the game go?’ ‘We creamed 'em!’
examples.chinese: “比赛怎么样？”“我们把他们打得一败涂地！”

examples.english: The Australians have once again routed the English cricket team.
examples.chinese: 澳大利亚队再次轻松地打败了英国板球队。

examples.english: I'd think twice before I started a fight with him - he'd wipe the floor with me!
examples.chinese: 我和他打架之前得再三考虑——他会把我打得落花流水！

expressions.gram: transitive verb not usually in progressive

examples.english: Ohio outplayed Michigan, especially in the fourth quarter, winning by 14 points.
examples.chinese: 俄亥俄队轻取密歇根队，尤其在第四节赢了14分。

centers.english: to defeat an enemy in war

examples.english: The army was well-trained and well-armed, and had little difficulty defeating the rebels.
examples.chinese: 军队训练有素，装备精良，几乎没费什么力便击溃了叛军。

examples.english: The Republicans were heavily defeated in the Spanish Civil War.
examples.chinese: 共和军在西班牙内战中遭到重创。

examples.english: Napoleon's army was strong enough to overwhelm nearly any potential enemy.
examples.chinese: 拿破仑的军队非常强大，几乎足以击垮任何潜在的敌人。

examples.english: With its greatly superior technology, the government forces completely overwhelmed the rebels.
examples.chinese: 政府军依靠高超的技术，彻底击垮了叛军。

examples.english: After a long and bloody battle the army succeeded in annihilating Seged's forces.
examples.chinese: 经过了一场持久的血腥战斗，军队终于摧毁了塞格德的部队。

examples.english: In 1945 Japan was helpless, with its military power annihilated.
examples.chinese: 1945年，由于军事力量已被摧毁，日本一筹莫展。

examples.english: The general was killed and his armies were routed in a magnificent cavalry charge.
examples.chinese: 在骑兵的大规模进袭中，将军阵亡，他的军队也被击溃。

examples.english: The disastrous Battle of the Boyne finally brought the Catholics to their knees.
examples.chinese: 经过那场惨烈的博因战役，天主教徒终于被打垮了。

examples.english: After years of trench warfare, the Kaiser's army had finally been brought to its knees.
examples.chinese: 经过了多年的堑壕阵地战，皇帝的军队终于被打败了。

examples.english: Sailors travelled to the New World with the urge to conquer and explore.
examples.chinese: 怀着征服与探险的强烈欲望，水手们坐船到了新大陆。

examples.english: Julius Caesar conquered Gaul, which we know today as France.
examples.chinese: 裘力斯·凯撒征服了高卢，也就是我们今天所知的法国。

centers.english: to beat someone by using your intelligence

examples.english: We can't fight them. We'll just have to try and outsmart them.
examples.chinese: 我们打不过他们，只能智取。

examples.english: None of the thieves wanted to admit that they had been outwitted by a couple of teenagers.
examples.chinese: 小偷中没有一个人愿意承认他们被几个十来岁的孩子智胜了。

expressions.text: be too clever for/be too smart for

examples.english: Molly tried to hide the presents but the children were too clever for her and found them within minutes.
examples.chinese: 莫莉想把礼物藏起来，但孩子们太聪明了，没几分钟就把礼物找出来了。

centers.english: when someone is beaten

examples.english: After his third successive election defeat he decided to retire from politics.
examples.chinese: 他连续三次竞选失败之后决定退出政坛。

examples.english: In the last game of the season they suffered a humiliating defeat, losing 7-0 to Real Madrid.
examples.chinese: 在赛季的最后一场比赛中，他们很不光彩地以0比7输给了皇家马德里队。

examples.english: The game was a rout, with the home team winning by 10 goals to nil.
examples.chinese: 那场比赛主队以10比0轻取客队。

examples.english: Gramm's drubbing by Davis in the California primary has badly hurt his campaign.
examples.chinese: 格拉姆在加州的初选中惨败于戴维斯，这给他的竞选活动造成了极坏的影响。

examples.english: The Lions took a drubbing from the Eagles last night, losing 58-37.
examples.chinese: 昨晚狮队惨败给鹰队，比分为37比58。

centers.english: to gamble

expressions.gram: intransitive/transitive verb or transitive phrasal verb

examples.english: Eddie loved to gamble, and would spend most evenings at the roulette table.
examples.chinese: 埃迪好赌，晚上大部分的时间都花在轮盘赌的赌桌上。

examples.english: Roger gambled away all his money in a Las Vegas casino.
examples.chinese: 罗杰在拉斯韦加斯的一个赌场输掉了他所有的钱。

examples.english: She inherited $50,000 but gambled it away.
examples.chinese: 她继承了五万美元，但是全赌输了。

examples.english: Is gambling legal here?
examples.chinese: 这里赌博合法吗?

examples.english: Your Uncle Maury has a gambling problem.
examples.chinese: 你的莫里叔叔有个好赌的恶习。

examples.english: Crane admits that he is addicted to gambling.
examples.chinese: 克兰承认自己嗜赌成瘾。

examples.english: He was against the introduction of a National Lottery as he thought it might encourage gambling.
examples.chinese: 他反对引进国民彩票，认为这会助长赌风。

examples.english: I don't bet very often.
examples.chinese: 我不常赌钱。

expressions.text: bet on something/have a bet on something

examples.english: We usually have a bet on the Grand Prix.
examples.chinese: 我们经常在国际汽车大奖赛上赌一赌。

examples.english: Rogers was not much of a gambler. When he bet on the horses, he almost always lost.
examples.chinese: 罗杰斯赌运不是很好,他赌马几乎总是输。

examples.english: Jerry bet $1000 on the game.
examples.chinese: 杰里在这场比赛上下了1,000美元的赌注。

examples.english: I've placed a bet on a horse in the next race.
examples.chinese: 我在下一场比赛的一匹马上下了赌注。

examples.english: All bets must be placed before the start of the race.
examples.chinese: 所有赌注必须在比赛开始之前下押。

examples.english: I put $20 on the Cowboys to win.
examples.chinese: 我押了20美元赌牛仔队赢。

examples.english: He put £50 on Middlesborough to beat Manchester United at odds of 3-1.
examples.chinese: 他押了50英镑赌米德尔斯伯勒队赢曼彻斯特联队，赔率为3比1。

examples.english: I think I'll put a bet on the next race.
examples.chinese: 我想下一场比赛我要下个注。

examples.english: We backed a horse named Travelling Light that finished first at 10-1.
examples.chinese: 我们以10比1的赔率在一匹名叫“光速”的马上押了赌注，结果它跑了第一名。

examples.english: Uncle Barry backed Arsenal to win the FA Cup.
examples.chinese: 巴里叔叔赌阿森纳队能夺得足总杯冠军。

examples.english: ‘Are we playing for money here, gentlemen?’ he said as he approached the pool table.
examples.chinese: “我们这里是赌钱的吗，先生们？”他说着朝桌球台走来。

examples.english: You're allowed to play cards in the bar, but not for money.
examples.chinese: 你可以在酒吧里玩纸牌，但不允许赌钱。

examples.english: I'm not a heavy gambler, but I like to have a flutter from time to time.
examples.chinese: 我并不贪赌，但偶尔也会玩一把。

examples.english: I had a little flutter on the Grand National and won £5.
examples.chinese: 我在全国越野障碍赛马上下了一笔小赌注，赢了五英镑。

examples.english: He claims that he lost the money on a dice game.
examples.chinese: 他说他是玩掷骰游戏输了钱的。

examples.english: I lost a lot of money on the dogs last night.
examples.chinese: 昨天晚上我赌狗输了不少钱。

examples.english: I heard that he won a lot of money on the Superbowl a few years ago.
examples.chinese: 我听说他几年之前在超级碗赛上赌赢了不少钱。

centers.english: someone who gambles

examples.english: Jack was a great drinker and gambler.
examples.chinese: 杰克是个大酒徒、大赌棍。

examples.english: De Niro plays Sam ‘Ace’ Rothstein, a professional gambler.
examples.chinese: 德尼罗饰演一名职业赌徒—“赌神”萨姆·罗恩坦。

examples.english: It was rumoured that he was a heavy gambler and lost large sums in Monte Carlo.
examples.chinese: 有传言说他是一个大赌棍，在蒙特卡洛输掉大笔大笔的钱。
